authors_text: Xiao Han,Leye Wang,Junjie Wu,Xiao Fang
title: Data Valuation for Vertical Federated Learning: A Model-free and Privacy-preserving Method
title_zh: 垂直联邦学习的数据评估：一种无模型且保护隐私的方法
abstract: Vertical Federated learning (VFL) is a promising paradigm for predictive analytics, empowering an organization (i.e., task party) to enhance its predictive models through collaborations with multiple data suppliers (i.e., data parties) in a decentralized and privacy-preserving way. Despite the fast-growing interest in VFL, the lack of effective and secure tools for assessing the value of data owned by data parties hinders the application of VFL in business contexts. In response, we propose FedValue, a privacy-preserving, task-specific but model-free data valuation method for VFL, which consists of a data valuation metric and a federated computation method. Specifically, we first introduce a novel data valuation metric, namely MShapley-CMI. The metric evaluates a data party's contribution to a predictive analytics task without the need of executing a machine learning model, making it well-suited for real-world applications of VFL. Next, we develop an innovative federated computation method that calculates the MShapley-CMI value for each data party in a privacy-preserving manner. Extensive experiments conducted on six public datasets validate the efficacy of FedValue for data valuation in the context of VFL. In addition, we illustrate the practical utility of FedValue with a case study involving federated movie recommendations.
summary: Vertical Federated learning (VFL) is a promising paradigm for predictive analytics, empowering an organization (i.e., task party) to enhance its predictive models through collaborations with multiple data suppliers (i.e., data parties) in a decentralized and privacy-preserving way. Despite the fast-growing interest in VFL, the lack of effective and secure tools for assessing the value of data owned by data parties hinders the application of VFL in business contexts. In response, we propose FedValue, a privacy-preserving, task-specific but model-free data valuation method for VFL, which consists of a data valuation metric and a federated computation method. Specifically, we first introduce a novel data valuation metric, namely MShapley-CMI. The metric evaluates a data party's contribution to a predictive analytics task without the need of executing a machine learning model, making it well-suited for real-world applications of VFL. Next, we develop an innovative federated computation method that calculates the MShapley-CMI value for each data party in a privacy-preserving manner. Extensive experiments conducted on six public datasets validate the efficacy of FedValue for data valuation in the context of VFL. In addition, we illustrate the practical utility of FedValue with a case study involving federated movie recommendations.
abstract_zh: 垂直联合学习（VFL）是预测分析的一种有前途的范例，它使组织（即任务方）能够通过与多个数据供应商（即数据方）以去中心化和保护隐私的方式合作来增强其预测模型。尽管人们对 VFL 的兴趣快速增长，但缺乏有效且安全的工具来评估数据方拥有的数据的价值，阻碍了 VFL 在商业环境中的应用。为此，我们提出了 FedValue，一种保护隐私、特定于任务但无模型的 VFL 数据评估方法，它由数据评估指标和联合计算方法组成。具体来说，我们首先引入一种新颖的数据评估指标，即 MShapley-CMI。该指标无需执行机器学习模型即可评估数据方对预测分析任务的贡献，使其非常适合 VFL 的实际应用。接下来，我们开发了一种创新的联合计算方法，以保护隐私的方式计算每个数据方的 MShapley-CMI 值。对六个公共数据集进行的广泛实验验证了 FedValue 在 VFL 背景下数据评估的有效性。此外，我们还通过涉及联合电影推荐的案例研究来说明 FedValue 的实际效用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedValue，一种用于垂直联邦学习（VFL）的隐私保护、无需模型的数据价值评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VFL缺乏有效且安全的数据价值评估工具，阻碍了其在商业场景中的应用，需开发无需模型且隐私保护的数据估值方法。
AI.method: 引入MShapley-CMI指标衡量数据贡献，并设计隐私保护的联邦计算方法，无需训练模型即可评估数据价值。
AI.result: 在六个公开数据集上的实验验证了FedValue的有效性，并通过联邦电影推荐案例展示了其实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: FedValue为VFL提供了高效、隐私友好的数据估值方案，有助于推动其在实际业务中的落地应用。

authors_text: Siyuan He,Pengcheng Xi,Ashkan Ebadi,Stephane Tremblay,Alexander Wong
title: Performance or Trust? Why Not Both. Deep AUC Maximization with Self-Supervised Learning for COVID-19 Chest X-ray Classifications
title_zh: 表现还是信任？为什么不两者都呢。通过自监督学习实现深度 AUC 最大化，用于 COVID-19 胸部 X 射线分类
abstract: Effective representation learning is the key in improving model performance for medical image analysis. In training deep learning models, a compromise often must be made between performance and trust, both of which are essential for medical applications. Moreover, models optimized with cross-entropy loss tend to suffer from unwarranted overconfidence in the majority class and over-cautiousness in the minority class. In this work, we integrate a new surrogate loss with self-supervised learning for computer-aided screening of COVID-19 patients using radiography images. In addition, we adopt a new quantification score to measure a model's trustworthiness. Ablation study is conducted for both the performance and the trust on feature learning methods and loss functions. Comparisons show that leveraging the new surrogate loss on self-supervised models can produce label-efficient networks that are both high-performing and trustworthy.
summary: Effective representation learning is the key in improving model performance for medical image analysis. In training deep learning models, a compromise often must be made between performance and trust, both of which are essential for medical applications. Moreover, models optimized with cross-entropy loss tend to suffer from unwarranted overconfidence in the majority class and over-cautiousness in the minority class. In this work, we integrate a new surrogate loss with self-supervised learning for computer-aided screening of COVID-19 patients using radiography images. In addition, we adopt a new quantification score to measure a model's trustworthiness. Ablation study is conducted for both the performance and the trust on feature learning methods and loss functions. Comparisons show that leveraging the new surrogate loss on self-supervised models can produce label-efficient networks that are both high-performing and trustworthy.
abstract_zh: 有效的表示学习是提高医学图像分析模型性能的关键。在训练深度学习模型时，通常必须在性能和信任之间做出妥协，这两者对于医疗应用来说都是至关重要的。此外，通过交叉熵损失优化的模型往往会遭受多数类别的无端过度自信和少数类别的过度谨慎。在这项工作中，我们将新的替代损失与自我监督学习相结合，使用放射线图像对 COVID-19 患者进行计算机辅助筛查。此外，我们采用新的量化分数来衡量模型的可信度。针对特征学习方法和损失函数的性能和信任度进行消融研究。比较表明，利用自监督模型上的新代理损失可以产生高性能且值得信赖的标签高效网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自监督学习和新替代损失函数的方法，用于改进COVID-19胸部X光分类模型的性能与可信度。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分析中需平衡模型性能与可信度，传统交叉熵损失易导致多数类过度自信和少数类过度谨慎，需改进方法以提升模型可靠性。
AI.method: 整合自监督学习与新型替代损失函数，并引入量化评分衡量模型可信度，通过消融实验验证特征学习方法与损失函数的效果。
AI.result: 新方法在标签高效网络中实现了高性能与高可信度，实验表明其优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合自监督学习与替代损失函数可有效提升医疗图像分类模型的性能与可信度平衡。

authors_text: Badr AlKhamissi,Akshay Srinivasan,Zeb-Kurth Nelson,Sam Ritter
title: How to Learn and Represent Abstractions: An Investigation using Symbolic Alchemy
title_zh: 如何学习和表示抽象：使用符号炼金术的研究
comment: Accepted at the AutoML-Conf 2022 Workshop Track
comments: Accepted at the AutoML-Conf 2022 Workshop Track
abstract: Alchemy is a new meta-learning environment rich enough to contain interesting abstractions, yet simple enough to make fine-grained analysis tractable. Further, Alchemy provides an optional symbolic interface that enables meta-RL research without a large compute budget. In this work, we take the first steps toward using Symbolic Alchemy to identify design choices that enable deep-RL agents to learn various types of abstraction. Then, using a variety of behavioral and introspective analyses we investigate how our trained agents use and represent abstract task variables, and find intriguing connections to the neuroscience of abstraction. We conclude by discussing the next steps for using meta-RL and Alchemy to better understand the representation of abstract variables in the brain.
summary: Alchemy is a new meta-learning environment rich enough to contain interesting abstractions, yet simple enough to make fine-grained analysis tractable. Further, Alchemy provides an optional symbolic interface that enables meta-RL research without a large compute budget. In this work, we take the first steps toward using Symbolic Alchemy to identify design choices that enable deep-RL agents to learn various types of abstraction. Then, using a variety of behavioral and introspective analyses we investigate how our trained agents use and represent abstract task variables, and find intriguing connections to the neuroscience of abstraction. We conclude by discussing the next steps for using meta-RL and Alchemy to better understand the representation of abstract variables in the brain.
abstract_zh: Alchemy 是一个新的元学习环境，内容丰富，可以包含有趣的抽象，但又足够简单，可以进行细粒度的分析。此外，Alchemy 还提供了一个可选的符号接口，无需大量计算预算即可实现元强化学习研究。在这项工作中，我们迈出了使用符号炼金术来确定设计选择的第一步，使深度强化学习智能体能够学习各种类型的抽象。然后，通过各种行为和内省分析，我们研究训练有素的智能体如何使用和表示抽象任务变量，并发现与抽象神经科学的有趣联系。最后，我们讨论了使用元强化学习和炼金术来更好地理解大脑中抽象变量的表示的后续步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文利用符号炼金术环境研究深度强化学习代理如何学习和表示抽象概念，并探索其与神经科学的关联。
AI.motivation: 设计一个既能包含复杂抽象又便于分析的元学习环境，以低成本研究抽象表示机制并推动神经科学相关发现。
AI.method: 构建Symbolic Alchemy环境，通过行为分析和内省分析研究代理对抽象任务变量的表征方式，结合神经科学视角进行对比验证。
AI.result: 发现代理在抽象学习中表现出与神经科学理论相符的变量表征模式，揭示了抽象表示的潜在机制。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步结合元强化学习与Alchemy环境，深化对大脑抽象变量表征机制的理解。

motivation: 设计一个既能包含复杂抽象又便于分析的元学习环境，以低成本研究抽象表示机制并推动神经科学相关发现。
method: 构建Symbolic Alchemy环境，通过行为分析和内省分析研究代理对抽象任务变量的表征方式，结合神经科学视角进行对比验证。
result: 发现代理在抽象学习中表现出与神经科学理论相符的变量表征模式，揭示了抽象表示的潜在机制。
conclusion: 未来需进一步结合元强化学习与Alchemy环境，深化对大脑抽象变量表征机制的理解。
search_text: How to Learn and Represent Abstractions: An Investigation using Symbolic Alchemy 如何学习和表示抽象：使用符号炼金术的研究 Alchemy is a new meta-learning environment rich enough to contain interesting abstractions, yet simple enough to make fine-grained analysis tractable. Further, Alchemy provides an optional symbolic interface that enables meta-RL research without a large compute budget. In this work, we take the first steps toward using Symbolic Alchemy to identify design choices that enable deep-RL agents to learn various types of abstraction. Then, using a variety of behavioral and introspective analyses we investigate how our trained agents use and represent abstract task variables, and find intriguing connections to the neuroscience of abstraction. We conclude by discussing the next steps for using meta-RL and Alchemy to better understand the representation of abstract variables in the brain. Alchemy 是一个新的元学习环境，内容丰富，可以包含有趣的抽象，但又足够简单，可以进行细粒度的分析。此外，Alchemy 还提供了一个可选的符号接口，无需大量计算预算即可实现元强化学习研究。在这项工作中，我们迈出了使用符号炼金术来确定设计选择的第一步，使深度强化学习智能体能够学习各种类型的抽象。然后，通过各种行为和内省分析，我们研究训练有素的智能体如何使用和表示抽象任务变量，并发现与抽象神经科学的有趣联系。最后，我们讨论了使用元强化学习和炼金术来更好地理解大脑中抽象变量的表示的后续步骤。 本文利用符号炼金术环境研究深度强化学习代理如何学习和表示抽象概念，并探索其与神经科学的关联。 Badr AlKhamissi,Akshay Srinivasan,Zeb-Kurth Nelson,Sam Ritter cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuquan Ye,Dongdong Chen,Songfang Han,Jing Liao
title: 3D Question Answering
title_zh: 3D问答
comment: To Appear at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG) 2022
comments: To Appear at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG) 2022
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) has witnessed tremendous progress in recent years. However, most efforts only focus on the 2D image question answering tasks. In this paper, we present the first attempt at extending VQA to the 3D domain, which can facilitate artificial intelligence's perception of 3D real-world scenarios. Different from image based VQA, 3D Question Answering (3DQA) takes the color point cloud as input and requires both appearance and 3D geometry comprehension ability to answer the 3D-related questions. To this end, we propose a novel transformer-based 3DQA framework "3DQA-TR", which consists of two encoders for exploiting the appearance and geometry information, respectively. The multi-modal information of appearance, geometry, and the linguistic question can finally attend to each other via a 3D-Linguistic Bert to predict the target answers. To verify the effectiveness of our proposed 3DQA framework, we further develop the first 3DQA dataset "ScanQA", which builds on the ScanNet dataset and contains $\sim$6K questions, $\sim$30K answers for $806$ scenes. Extensive experiments on this dataset demonstrate the obvious superiority of our proposed 3DQA framework over existing VQA frameworks, and the effectiveness of our major designs. Our code and dataset will be made publicly available to facilitate the research in this direction.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) has witnessed tremendous progress in recent years. However, most efforts only focus on the 2D image question answering tasks. In this paper, we present the first attempt at extending VQA to the 3D domain, which can facilitate artificial intelligence's perception of 3D real-world scenarios. Different from image based VQA, 3D Question Answering (3DQA) takes the color point cloud as input and requires both appearance and 3D geometry comprehension ability to answer the 3D-related questions. To this end, we propose a novel transformer-based 3DQA framework "3DQA-TR", which consists of two encoders for exploiting the appearance and geometry information, respectively. The multi-modal information of appearance, geometry, and the linguistic question can finally attend to each other via a 3D-Linguistic Bert to predict the target answers. To verify the effectiveness of our proposed 3DQA framework, we further develop the first 3DQA dataset "ScanQA", which builds on the ScanNet dataset and contains $\sim$6K questions, $\sim$30K answers for $806$ scenes. Extensive experiments on this dataset demonstrate the obvious superiority of our proposed 3DQA framework over existing VQA frameworks, and the effectiveness of our major designs. Our code and dataset will be made publicly available to facilitate the research in this direction.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）近年来取得了巨大进步。然而，大多数努力仅集中在 2D 图像问答任务上。在本文中，我们首次尝试将 VQA 扩展到 3D 领域，这可以促进人工智能对 3D 现实世界场景的感知。与基于图像的 VQA 不同，3D 问答（3DQA）以颜色点云为输入，需要外观和 3D 几何理解能力来回答 3D 相关问题。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的 3DQA 框架“3DQA-TR”，它由两个编码器组成，分别用于利用外观和几何信息。外观、几何和语言问题的多模态信息最终可以通过 3D-Linguistic Bert 相互关联来预测目标答案。为了验证我们提出的 3DQA 框架的有效性，我们进一步开发了第一个 3DQA 数据集“ScanQA”，它建立在 ScanNet 数据集的基础上，包含 $\sim$6K 问题、$\sim$30K 答案（针对 $806$ 场景）。对该数据集的大量实验证明了我们提出的 3DQA 框架相对于现有 VQA 框架的明显优越性，以及我们主要设计的有效性。我们的代码和数据集将公开，以促进这一方向的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个面向3D场景的问答框架3DQA-TR，利用点云数据结合外观与几何信息回答3D相关问题，并构建ScanQA数据集推动研究。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉问答研究主要聚焦2D图像，缺乏对3D真实场景的感知能力，需开发新型框架以提升AI对三维世界的理解。
AI.method: 设计包含外观与几何编码器的Transformer框架3DQA-TR，通过3D-Linguistic Bert融合多模态信息，结合ScanNet构建ScanQA数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在ScanQA数据集上显著优于现有VQA框架，证明方法有效性，代码与数据集将公开促进后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 3DQA-TR框架及ScanQA数据集为三维视觉问答研究奠定基础，未来可拓展至更多现实场景应用。

authors_text: Alexey Pustynnikov,Dmitry Eremeev
title: Estimating Uncertainty For Vehicle Motion Prediction on Yandex Shifts Dataset
title_zh: 估计 Yandex Shifts 数据集上车辆运动预测的不确定性
abstract: Motion prediction of surrounding agents is an important task in context of autonomous driving since it is closely related to driver's safety. Vehicle Motion Prediction (VMP) track of Shifts Challenge focuses on developing models which are robust to distributional shift and able to measure uncertainty of their predictions. In this work we present the approach that significantly improved provided benchmark and took 2nd place on the leaderboard.
summary: Motion prediction of surrounding agents is an important task in context of autonomous driving since it is closely related to driver's safety. Vehicle Motion Prediction (VMP) track of Shifts Challenge focuses on developing models which are robust to distributional shift and able to measure uncertainty of their predictions. In this work we present the approach that significantly improved provided benchmark and took 2nd place on the leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 周围智能体的运动预测是自动驾驶背景下的一项重要任务，因为它与驾驶员的安全密切相关。 Shifts Challenge 的车辆运动预测 (VMP) 赛道侧重于开发对分布变化具有鲁棒性并能够测量其预测的不确定性的模型。在这项工作中，我们提出的方法显着改进了所提供的基准并在排行榜上排名第二。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种改进的车辆运动预测方法，通过估计预测不确定性来提升自动驾驶场景下的安全性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 车辆运动预测的不确定性直接影响自动驾驶系统的安全决策，现有模型在面对分布偏移时表现不足，需开发能有效量化预测不确定性的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种结合分布偏移鲁棒性与不确定性估计的模型优化方案，具体技术细节未明确说明但显著提升了基准性能。
AI.result: 在Yandex Shifts挑战赛的车辆运动预测任务中，该方法取得第二名的 leaderboard 成绩。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性估计对提升运动预测的可靠性至关重要，所提方法验证了该方向的有效性，为后续研究提供了实践参考。

authors_text: Ann Lee,Hongyu Gong,Paul-Ambroise Duquenne,Holger Schwenk,Peng-Jen Chen,Changhan Wang,Sravya Popuri,Yossi Adi,Juan Pino,Jiatao Gu,Wei-Ning Hsu
title: Textless Speech-to-Speech Translation on Real Data
title_zh: 真实数据上的无文本语音翻译
abstract: We present a textless speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) system that can translate speech from one language into another language and can be built without the need of any text data. Different from existing work in the literature, we tackle the challenge in modeling multi-speaker target speech and train the systems with real-world S2ST data. The key to our approach is a self-supervised unit-based speech normalization technique, which finetunes a pre-trained speech encoder with paired audios from multiple speakers and a single reference speaker to reduce the variations due to accents, while preserving the lexical content. With only 10 minutes of paired data for speech normalization, we obtain on average 3.2 BLEU gain when training the S2ST model on the VoxPopuli S2ST dataset, compared to a baseline trained on un-normalized speech target. We also incorporate automatically mined S2ST data and show an additional 2.0 BLEU gain. To our knowledge, we are the first to establish a textless S2ST technique that can be trained with real-world data and works for multiple language pairs. Audio samples are available at https://facebookresearch.github.io/speech_translation/textless_s2st_real_data/index.html .
summary: We present a textless speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) system that can translate speech from one language into another language and can be built without the need of any text data. Different from existing work in the literature, we tackle the challenge in modeling multi-speaker target speech and train the systems with real-world S2ST data. The key to our approach is a self-supervised unit-based speech normalization technique, which finetunes a pre-trained speech encoder with paired audios from multiple speakers and a single reference speaker to reduce the variations due to accents, while preserving the lexical content. With only 10 minutes of paired data for speech normalization, we obtain on average 3.2 BLEU gain when training the S2ST model on the VoxPopuli S2ST dataset, compared to a baseline trained on un-normalized speech target. We also incorporate automatically mined S2ST data and show an additional 2.0 BLEU gain. To our knowledge, we are the first to establish a textless S2ST technique that can be trained with real-world data and works for multiple language pairs. Audio samples are available at https://facebookresearch.github.io/speech_translation/textless_s2st_real_data/index.html .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种无文本语音到语音翻译（S2ST）系统，可以将语音从一种语言翻译成另一种语言，并且无需任何文本数据即可构建。与文献中的现有工作不同，我们解决了多说话者目标语音建模的挑战，并使用真实世界的 S2ST 数据训练系统。我们方法的关键是基于自我监督单元的语音归一化技术，该技术利用来自多个说话者和单个参考说话者的配对音频对预先训练的语音编码器进行微调，以减少因口音引起的变化，同时保留词汇内容。与在非标准化语音目标上训练的基线相比，仅用 10 分钟的配对数据进行语音标准化，在 VoxPopuli S2ST 数据集上训练 S2ST 模型时，我们平均获得 3.2 BLEU 增益。我们还合并了自动挖掘的 S2ST 数据，并显示了额外的 2.0 BLEU 增益。据我们所知，我们是第一个建立无文本 S2ST 技术的人，该技术可以使用真实世界的数据进行训练，并适用于多种语言对。音频样本可在 https://facebookresearch.github.io/speech_translation/textless_s2st_real_data/index.html 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需文本数据的语音到语音翻译（S2ST）系统，能够直接将一种语言的语音翻译为另一种语言的语音。
AI.motivation: 现有S2ST方法依赖文本数据，而实际场景中文本可能不可用。本文旨在构建无需文本、基于真实数据的多语言S2ST系统，并解决多说话人语音建模的挑战。
AI.method: 采用自监督的单元级语音归一化技术，通过多说话人与参考说话人的配对音频微调预训练语音编码器，减少口音差异同时保留语义内容，并结合自动挖掘的S2ST数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在VoxPopuli数据集上，使用10分钟配对数据使S2ST模型BLEU值提升3.2点，结合自动挖掘数据进一步提升2.0点，实现了首个无需文本的多语言对真实数据S2ST技术。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了基于语音归一化和真实数据挖掘的文本无关S2ST方法的可行性，为实际语音翻译场景提供了新思路。

search_text: Textless Speech-to-Speech Translation on Real Data 真实数据上的无文本语音翻译 We present a textless speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) system that can translate speech from one language into another language and can be built without the need of any text data. Different from existing work in the literature, we tackle the challenge in modeling multi-speaker target speech and train the systems with real-world S2ST data. The key to our approach is a self-supervised unit-based speech normalization technique, which finetunes a pre-trained speech encoder with paired audios from multiple speakers and a single reference speaker to reduce the variations due to accents, while preserving the lexical content. With only 10 minutes of paired data for speech normalization, we obtain on average 3.2 BLEU gain when training the S2ST model on the VoxPopuli S2ST dataset, compared to a baseline trained on un-normalized speech target. We also incorporate automatically mined S2ST data and show an additional 2.0 BLEU gain. To our knowledge, we are the first to establish a textless S2ST technique that can be trained with real-world data and works for multiple language pairs. Audio samples are available at https://facebookresearch.github.io/speech_translation/textless_s2st_real_data/index.html . 我们提出了一种无文本语音到语音翻译（S2ST）系统，可以将语音从一种语言翻译成另一种语言，并且无需任何文本数据即可构建。与文献中的现有工作不同，我们解决了多说话者目标语音建模的挑战，并使用真实世界的 S2ST 数据训练系统。我们方法的关键是基于自我监督单元的语音归一化技术，该技术利用来自多个说话者和单个参考说话者的配对音频对预先训练的语音编码器进行微调，以减少因口音引起的变化，同时保留词汇内容。与在非标准化语音目标上训练的基线相比，仅用 10 分钟的配对数据进行语音标准化，在 VoxPopuli S2ST 数据集上训练 S2ST 模型时，我们平均获得 3.2 BLEU 增益。我们还合并了自动挖掘的 S2ST 数据，并显示了额外的 2.0 BLEU 增益。据我们所知，我们是第一个建立无文本 S2ST 技术的人，该技术可以使用真实世界的数据进行训练，并适用于多种语言对。音频样本可在 https://facebookresearch.github.io/speech_translation/textless_s2st_real_data/index.html 获取。 本文提出了一种无需文本数据的语音到语音翻译（S2ST）系统，能够直接将一种语言的语音翻译为另一种语言的语音。 Ann Lee,Hongyu Gong,Paul-Ambroise Duquenne,Holger Schwenk,Peng-Jen Chen,Changhan Wang,Sravya Popuri,Yossi Adi,Juan Pino,Jiatao Gu,Wei-Ning Hsu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Travis Mandel,Mark Jimenez,Emily Risley,Taishi Nammoto,Rebekka Williams,Max Panoff,Meynard Ballesteros,Bobbie Suarez
title: Reliable Multi-Object Tracking in the Presence of Unreliable Detections
title_zh: 在存在不可靠检测的情况下进行可靠的多目标跟踪
comment: The full journal version of this article (published in Pattern Recognition, Vol. 135) can be found at https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0031320322005878. The article is open access. The source code and dataset can be found at https://github.com/tmandel/fish-detrac
comments: The full journal version of this article (published in Pattern Recognition, Vol. 135) can be found at https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0031320322005878. The article is open access. The source code and dataset can be found at https://github.com/tmandel/fish-detrac
abstract: Recent multi-object tracking (MOT) systems have leveraged highly accurate object detectors; however, training such detectors requires large amounts of labeled data. Although such data is widely available for humans and vehicles, it is significantly more scarce for other animal species. We present Robust Confidence Tracking (RCT), an algorithm designed to maintain robust performance even when detection quality is poor. In contrast to prior methods which discard detection confidence information, RCT takes a fundamentally different approach, relying on the exact detection confidence values to initialize tracks, extend tracks, and filter tracks. In particular, RCT is able to minimize identity switches by efficiently using low-confidence detections (along with a single object tracker) to keep continuous track of objects. To evaluate trackers in the presence of unreliable detections, we present a challenging real-world underwater fish tracking dataset, FISHTRAC. In an evaluation on FISHTRAC as well as the UA-DETRAC dataset, we find that RCT outperforms other algorithms when provided with imperfect detections, including state-of-the-art deep single and multi-object trackers as well as more classic approaches. Specifically, RCT has the best average HOTA across methods that successfully return results for all sequences, and has significantly less identity switches than other methods.
summary: Recent multi-object tracking (MOT) systems have leveraged highly accurate object detectors; however, training such detectors requires large amounts of labeled data. Although such data is widely available for humans and vehicles, it is significantly more scarce for other animal species. We present Robust Confidence Tracking (RCT), an algorithm designed to maintain robust performance even when detection quality is poor. In contrast to prior methods which discard detection confidence information, RCT takes a fundamentally different approach, relying on the exact detection confidence values to initialize tracks, extend tracks, and filter tracks. In particular, RCT is able to minimize identity switches by efficiently using low-confidence detections (along with a single object tracker) to keep continuous track of objects. To evaluate trackers in the presence of unreliable detections, we present a challenging real-world underwater fish tracking dataset, FISHTRAC. In an evaluation on FISHTRAC as well as the UA-DETRAC dataset, we find that RCT outperforms other algorithms when provided with imperfect detections, including state-of-the-art deep single and multi-object trackers as well as more classic approaches. Specifically, RCT has the best average HOTA across methods that successfully return results for all sequences, and has significantly less identity switches than other methods.
abstract_zh: 最近的多目标跟踪（MOT）系统利用了高精度的目标检测器；然而，训练此类检测器需要大量标记数据。尽管人类和车辆的此类数据广泛可用，但其他动物物种的数据却更加稀缺。我们提出了鲁棒置信跟踪（RCT），这是一种即使在检测质量较差时也能保持鲁棒性能的算法。与丢弃检测置信度信息的现有方法相比，RCT 采用了根本不同的方法，依靠精确的检测置信度值来初始化轨迹、扩展轨迹和过滤轨迹。特别是，RCT 能够通过有效地使用低置信度检测（以及单个对象跟踪器）来持续跟踪对象，从而最大限度地减少身份切换。为了在存在不可靠检测的情况下评估跟踪器，我们提出了一个具有挑战性的现实世界水下鱼类跟踪数据集 FISHTRAC。在对 FISHTRAC 以及 UA-DETRAC 数据集的评估中，我们发现 RCT 在提供不完善的检测时优于其他算法，包括最先进的深度单目标和多目标跟踪器以及更经典的方法。具体来说，RCT 在成功返回所有序列结果的方法中具有最佳的平均 HOTA，并且比其他方法具有显着更少的身份转换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Robust Confidence Tracking (RCT)的算法，用于在检测质量不佳的情况下实现可靠的多目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪系统依赖高精度检测器，但其他物种的标注数据稀缺，导致检测质量下降。需要一种在低质量检测下仍能保持性能的跟踪方法。
AI.method: RCT利用检测置信度值初始化、延长和过滤轨迹，通过低置信度检测与单目标跟踪器结合，减少身份切换。
AI.result: 在FISHTRAC和UA-DETRAC数据集上，RCT在不完美检测下优于其他方法，具有最佳平均HOTA分数和最少的身份切换。
AI.conclusion: RCT通过有效利用检测置信度，在不可靠检测场景下实现了更鲁棒的跟踪性能，适用于数据稀缺的领域。

authors_text: Yinan He,Lu Sheng,Jing Shao,Ziwei Liu,Zhaofan Zou,Zhizhi Guo,Shan Jiang,Curitis Sun,Guosheng Zhang,Keyao Wang,Haixiao Yue,Zhibin Hong,Wanguo Wang,Zhenyu Li,Qi Wang,Zhenli Wang,Ronghao Xu,Mingwen Zhang,Zhiheng Wang,Zhenhang Huang,Tianming Zhang,Ningning Zhao
title: ForgeryNet -- Face Forgery Analysis Challenge 2021: Methods and Results
title_zh: ForgeryNet——2021 年人脸伪造分析挑战赛：方法和结果
abstract: The rapid progress of photorealistic synthesis techniques has reached a critical point where the boundary between real and manipulated images starts to blur. Recently, a mega-scale deep face forgery dataset, ForgeryNet which comprised of 2.9 million images and 221,247 videos has been released. It is by far the largest publicly available in terms of data-scale, manipulations (7 image-level approaches, 8 video-level approaches), perturbations (36 independent and more mixed perturbations), and annotations (6.3 million classification labels, 2.9 million manipulated area annotations, and 221,247 temporal forgery segment labels). This paper reports methods and results in the ForgeryNet - Face Forgery Analysis Challenge 2021, which employs the ForgeryNet benchmark. The model evaluation is conducted offline on the private test set. A total of 186 participants registered for the competition, and 11 teams made valid submissions. We will analyze the top-ranked solutions and present some discussion on future work directions.
summary: The rapid progress of photorealistic synthesis techniques has reached a critical point where the boundary between real and manipulated images starts to blur. Recently, a mega-scale deep face forgery dataset, ForgeryNet which comprised of 2.9 million images and 221,247 videos has been released. It is by far the largest publicly available in terms of data-scale, manipulations (7 image-level approaches, 8 video-level approaches), perturbations (36 independent and more mixed perturbations), and annotations (6.3 million classification labels, 2.9 million manipulated area annotations, and 221,247 temporal forgery segment labels). This paper reports methods and results in the ForgeryNet - Face Forgery Analysis Challenge 2021, which employs the ForgeryNet benchmark. The model evaluation is conducted offline on the private test set. A total of 186 participants registered for the competition, and 11 teams made valid submissions. We will analyze the top-ranked solutions and present some discussion on future work directions.
abstract_zh: 真实感合成技术的快速进步已经达到了一个临界点，真实图像和经过处理的图像之间的界限开始变得模糊。最近，一个由290万张图像和221,247个视频组成的超大规模深度人脸伪造数据集ForgeryNet已经发布。就数据规模、操作（7 个图像级方法、8 个视频级方法）、扰动（36 个独立和更多混合扰动）和注释（630 万个分类标签、290 万个操作区域注释和 221,247 个时间伪造片段标签）而言，它是迄今为止公开可用的最大的。本文报告了 ForgeryNet - Face Forgery Analysis Challenge 2021 中采用 ForgeryNet 基准的方法和结果。模型评估是在私人测试集上离线进行的。本次比赛共有186名参赛者报名，11支队伍提交了有效参赛作品。我们将分析排名靠前的解决方案，并对未来的工作方向进行一些讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ForgeryNet数据集及其在2021年Face Forgery Analysis Challenge中的方法和结果，旨在推动人脸伪造检测技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 随着照片级合成技术的进步，真实图像与伪造图像的界限逐渐模糊，亟需大规模数据集和挑战赛推动相关检测技术的研究。
AI.method: 通过发布包含290万张图像和22万段视频的ForgeryNet数据集，组织挑战赛并采用离线测试集进行模型评估，分析参赛团队的解决方案。
AI.result: 共有186名参赛者注册，11支队伍提交有效结果，论文分析了排名靠前的方案并讨论了未来研究方向。

search_text: ForgeryNet -- Face Forgery Analysis Challenge 2021: Methods and Results ForgeryNet——2021 年人脸伪造分析挑战赛：方法和结果 The rapid progress of photorealistic synthesis techniques has reached a critical point where the boundary between real and manipulated images starts to blur. Recently, a mega-scale deep face forgery dataset, ForgeryNet which comprised of 2.9 million images and 221,247 videos has been released. It is by far the largest publicly available in terms of data-scale, manipulations (7 image-level approaches, 8 video-level approaches), perturbations (36 independent and more mixed perturbations), and annotations (6.3 million classification labels, 2.9 million manipulated area annotations, and 221,247 temporal forgery segment labels). This paper reports methods and results in the ForgeryNet - Face Forgery Analysis Challenge 2021, which employs the ForgeryNet benchmark. The model evaluation is conducted offline on the private test set. A total of 186 participants registered for the competition, and 11 teams made valid submissions. We will analyze the top-ranked solutions and present some discussion on future work directions. 真实感合成技术的快速进步已经达到了一个临界点，真实图像和经过处理的图像之间的界限开始变得模糊。最近，一个由290万张图像和221,247个视频组成的超大规模深度人脸伪造数据集ForgeryNet已经发布。就数据规模、操作（7 个图像级方法、8 个视频级方法）、扰动（36 个独立和更多混合扰动）和注释（630 万个分类标签、290 万个操作区域注释和 221,247 个时间伪造片段标签）而言，它是迄今为止公开可用的最大的。本文报告了 ForgeryNet - Face Forgery Analysis Challenge 2021 中采用 ForgeryNet 基准的方法和结果。模型评估是在私人测试集上离线进行的。本次比赛共有186名参赛者报名，11支队伍提交了有效参赛作品。我们将分析排名靠前的解决方案，并对未来的工作方向进行一些讨论。 本文介绍了ForgeryNet数据集及其在2021年Face Forgery Analysis Challenge中的方法和结果，旨在推动人脸伪造检测技术的发展。 Yinan He,Lu Sheng,Jing Shao,Ziwei Liu,Zhaofan Zou,Zhizhi Guo,Shan Jiang,Curitis Sun,Guosheng Zhang,Keyao Wang,Haixiao Yue,Zhibin Hong,Wanguo Wang,Zhenyu Li,Qi Wang,Zhenli Wang,Ronghao Xu,Mingwen Zhang,Zhiheng Wang,Zhenhang Huang,Tianming Zhang,Ningning Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Marina Fernández-Campoamor,Corey O'Meara,Giorgio Cortiana,Vedran Peric,Juan Bernabé-Moreno
title: Community Detection in Electrical Grids Using Quantum Annealing
title_zh: 使用量子退火进行电网中的社区检测
abstract: With the increase of intermittent renewable generation resources feeding into the electrical grid, Distribution System Operators (DSOs) must find ways to incorporate these new actors and adapt the grid to ensure stability and enable flexibility. Dividing the grid into logical clusters entails several organization and technical benefits, helping overcome these challenges.However, finding the optimal grid partitioning remains a challenging task due to its complexity. At the same time, a new technology has gained traction in the last decades for its promising speed-up potential in solving non-trivial combinatorial optimization problems: quantum computing. This work explores its application in Graph Partitioning using electrical modularity. We benchmarked several quantum annealing and hybrid methods on IEEE well-known test cases. The results obtained for the IEEE 14-bus test case show that quantum annealing DWaveSampler brings equal solutions or, for the optimal number partitions, a 1% improvement. For the more significant test cases, hybrid quantum annealing shows a relative error of less than 0.02% compared to the classical benchmark and for IEEE 118-bus test case shows time performance speed-up. The increment in performance would enable real time planning and operations of electrical grids in real time. This work intends to be the first step to showcase the potentials of quantum computing towards the modernization and adaption of electrical grids to the decentralized future of energy systems.
summary: With the increase of intermittent renewable generation resources feeding into the electrical grid, Distribution System Operators (DSOs) must find ways to incorporate these new actors and adapt the grid to ensure stability and enable flexibility. Dividing the grid into logical clusters entails several organization and technical benefits, helping overcome these challenges.However, finding the optimal grid partitioning remains a challenging task due to its complexity. At the same time, a new technology has gained traction in the last decades for its promising speed-up potential in solving non-trivial combinatorial optimization problems: quantum computing. This work explores its application in Graph Partitioning using electrical modularity. We benchmarked several quantum annealing and hybrid methods on IEEE well-known test cases. The results obtained for the IEEE 14-bus test case show that quantum annealing DWaveSampler brings equal solutions or, for the optimal number partitions, a 1% improvement. For the more significant test cases, hybrid quantum annealing shows a relative error of less than 0.02% compared to the classical benchmark and for IEEE 118-bus test case shows time performance speed-up. The increment in performance would enable real time planning and operations of electrical grids in real time. This work intends to be the first step to showcase the potentials of quantum computing towards the modernization and adaption of electrical grids to the decentralized future of energy systems.
abstract_zh: 随着输入电网的间歇性可再生发电资源的增加，配电系统运营商 (DSO) 必须找到方法来整合这些新参与者并调整电网，以确保稳定性并实现灵活性。将网格划分为逻辑集群带来了多种组织和技术优势，有助于克服这些挑战。然而，由于其复杂性，找到最佳网格划分仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。与此同时，一项新技术在过去几十年中因其在解决非平凡组合优化问题方面的加速潜力而受到关注：量子计算。这项工作探索了它在使用电气模块化的图分区中的应用。我们在 IEEE 知名测试用例上对几种量子退火和混合方法进行了基准测试。 IEEE 14 总线测试用例获得的结果表明，量子退火 DWaveSampler 带来了相同的解决方案，或者对于最佳数量分区，提高了 1%。对于更重要的测试用例，与经典基准相比，混合量子退火显示相对误差小于 0.02%，而对于 IEEE 118 总线测试用例则显示时间性能加速。性能的提高将使电网的实时规划和运行成为可能。这项工作旨在成为展示量子计算在电网现代化和适应能源系统去中心化未来方面的潜力的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用量子退火技术解决电力网络社区检测问题，以优化电网分区。
AI.motivation: 随着间歇性可再生能源接入电网，配电系统运营商需通过逻辑分区提升电网稳定性与灵活性，但传统方法难以应对复杂优化问题。
AI.method: 采用量子退火（如DWaveSampler）及混合量子退火方法，在IEEE标准测试案例（如14节点、118节点）上验证电气模块度的图划分效果。
AI.result: 在IEEE 14节点案例中，量子退火结果与最优解误差小于1%；在118节点案例中，混合方法相较经典算法误差低于0.02%且速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算在电网实时规划与操作中展现潜力，为能源系统去中心化转型提供技术路径。

authors_text: Rui Zhang,Shihua Zhang
title: Rethinking Influence Functions of Neural Networks in the Over-parameterized Regime
title_zh: 重新思考过度参数化机制中神经网络的影响功能
abstract: Understanding the black-box prediction for neural networks is challenging. To achieve this, early studies have designed influence function (IF) to measure the effect of removing a single training point on neural networks. However, the classic implicit Hessian-vector product (IHVP) method for calculating IF is fragile, and theoretical analysis of IF in the context of neural networks is still lacking. To this end, we utilize the neural tangent kernel (NTK) theory to calculate IF for the neural network trained with regularized mean-square loss, and prove that the approximation error can be arbitrarily small when the width is sufficiently large for two-layer ReLU networks. We analyze the error bound for the classic IHVP method in the over-parameterized regime to understand when and why it fails or not. In detail, our theoretical analysis reveals that (1) the accuracy of IHVP depends on the regularization term, and is pretty low under weak regularization; (2) the accuracy of IHVP has a significant correlation with the probability density of corresponding training points. We further borrow the theory from NTK to understand the IFs better, including quantifying the complexity for influential samples and depicting the variation of IFs during the training dynamics. Numerical experiments on real-world data confirm our theoretical results and demonstrate our findings.
summary: Understanding the black-box prediction for neural networks is challenging. To achieve this, early studies have designed influence function (IF) to measure the effect of removing a single training point on neural networks. However, the classic implicit Hessian-vector product (IHVP) method for calculating IF is fragile, and theoretical analysis of IF in the context of neural networks is still lacking. To this end, we utilize the neural tangent kernel (NTK) theory to calculate IF for the neural network trained with regularized mean-square loss, and prove that the approximation error can be arbitrarily small when the width is sufficiently large for two-layer ReLU networks. We analyze the error bound for the classic IHVP method in the over-parameterized regime to understand when and why it fails or not. In detail, our theoretical analysis reveals that (1) the accuracy of IHVP depends on the regularization term, and is pretty low under weak regularization; (2) the accuracy of IHVP has a significant correlation with the probability density of corresponding training points. We further borrow the theory from NTK to understand the IFs better, including quantifying the complexity for influential samples and depicting the variation of IFs during the training dynamics. Numerical experiments on real-world data confirm our theoretical results and demonstrate our findings.
abstract_zh: 理解神经网络的黑盒预测具有挑战性。为了实现这一目标，早期研究设计了影响函数（IF）来衡量删除单个训练点对神经网络的影响。然而，计算 IF 的经典隐式 Hessian 向量积（IHVP）方法很脆弱，并且仍然缺乏神经网络背景下 IF 的理论分析。为此，我们利用神经正切核（NTK）理论来计算用正则化均方损失训练的神经网络的IF，并证明当两层ReLU网络的宽度足够大时，逼近误差可以任意小。我们分析了经典 IHVP 方法在过度参数化情况下的误差界限，以了解其失败的时间和原因。具体来说，我们的理论分析表明：（1）IHVP 的准确性取决于正则化项，并且在弱正则化下相当低； (2) IHVP的准确率与对应训练点的概率密度有显着的相关性。我们进一步借用 NTK 的理论来更好地理解 IF，包括量化有影响力样本的复杂性并描述 IF 在训练动态过程中的变化。对现实世界数据的数值实验证实了我们的理论结果并证明了我们的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考了神经网络在过度参数化情况下的影响函数计算方法。
AI.motivation: 传统影响函数计算方法（如IHVP）存在脆弱性，且缺乏理论分析，难以准确评估训练点对模型的影响。
AI.method: 利用神经切线核（NTK）理论推导正则化均方损失下的影响函数，并分析过度参数化场景下IHVP方法的误差界。
AI.result: 理论证明在足够宽的两层ReLU网络中，NTK方法的近似误差可任意小；揭示IHVP精度与正则化项及训练点密度的相关性，并通过实验验证结论。
AI.conclusion: NTK理论为理解过度参数化神经网络的影响函数提供了更可靠的分析框架，且揭示了IHVP方法的局限性。

motivation: 传统影响函数计算方法（如IHVP）存在脆弱性，且缺乏理论分析，难以准确评估训练点对模型的影响。
method: 利用神经切线核（NTK）理论推导正则化均方损失下的影响函数，并分析过度参数化场景下IHVP方法的误差界。
result: 理论证明在足够宽的两层ReLU网络中，NTK方法的近似误差可任意小；揭示IHVP精度与正则化项及训练点密度的相关性，并通过实验验证结论。
conclusion: NTK理论为理解过度参数化神经网络的影响函数提供了更可靠的分析框架，且揭示了IHVP方法的局限性。
search_text: Rethinking Influence Functions of Neural Networks in the Over-parameterized Regime 重新思考过度参数化机制中神经网络的影响功能 Understanding the black-box prediction for neural networks is challenging. To achieve this, early studies have designed influence function (IF) to measure the effect of removing a single training point on neural networks. However, the classic implicit Hessian-vector product (IHVP) method for calculating IF is fragile, and theoretical analysis of IF in the context of neural networks is still lacking. To this end, we utilize the neural tangent kernel (NTK) theory to calculate IF for the neural network trained with regularized mean-square loss, and prove that the approximation error can be arbitrarily small when the width is sufficiently large for two-layer ReLU networks. We analyze the error bound for the classic IHVP method in the over-parameterized regime to understand when and why it fails or not. In detail, our theoretical analysis reveals that (1) the accuracy of IHVP depends on the regularization term, and is pretty low under weak regularization; (2) the accuracy of IHVP has a significant correlation with the probability density of corresponding training points. We further borrow the theory from NTK to understand the IFs better, including quantifying the complexity for influential samples and depicting the variation of IFs during the training dynamics. Numerical experiments on real-world data confirm our theoretical results and demonstrate our findings. 理解神经网络的黑盒预测具有挑战性。为了实现这一目标，早期研究设计了影响函数（IF）来衡量删除单个训练点对神经网络的影响。然而，计算 IF 的经典隐式 Hessian 向量积（IHVP）方法很脆弱，并且仍然缺乏神经网络背景下 IF 的理论分析。为此，我们利用神经正切核（NTK）理论来计算用正则化均方损失训练的神经网络的IF，并证明当两层ReLU网络的宽度足够大时，逼近误差可以任意小。我们分析了经典 IHVP 方法在过度参数化情况下的误差界限，以了解其失败的时间和原因。具体来说，我们的理论分析表明：（1）IHVP 的准确性取决于正则化项，并且在弱正则化下相当低； (2) IHVP的准确率与对应训练点的概率密度有显着的相关性。我们进一步借用 NTK 的理论来更好地理解 IF，包括量化有影响力样本的复杂性并描述 IF 在训练动态过程中的变化。对现实世界数据的数值实验证实了我们的理论结果并证明了我们的发现。 本文重新思考了神经网络在过度参数化情况下的影响函数计算方法。 Rui Zhang,Shihua Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Filippos Gouidis,Theodore Patkos,Antonis Argyros,Dimitris Plexousakis
title: Detecting Object States vs Detecting Objects: A New Dataset and a Quantitative Experimental Study
title_zh: 检测对象状态与检测对象：新数据集和定量实验研究
comment: Submitted to the Proceedings of the 17th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications (VISAPP)
comments: Submitted to the Proceedings of the 17th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications (VISAPP)
abstract: The detection of object states in images (State Detection - SD) is a problem of both theoretical and practical importance and it is tightly interwoven with other important computer vision problems, such as action recognition and affordance detection. It is also highly relevant to any entity that needs to reason and act in dynamic domains, such as robotic systems and intelligent agents. Despite its importance, up to now, the research on this problem has been limited. In this paper, we attempt a systematic study of the SD problem. First, we introduce the Object State Detection Dataset (OSDD), a new publicly available dataset consisting of more than 19,000 annotations for 18 object categories and 9 state classes. Second, using a standard deep learning framework used for Object Detection (OD), we conduct a number of appropriately designed experiments, towards an in-depth study of the behavior of the SD problem. This study enables the setup of a baseline on the performance of SD, as well as its relative performance in comparison to OD, in a variety of scenarios. Overall, the experimental outcomes confirm that SD is harder than OD and that tailored SD methods need to be developed for addressing effectively this significant problem.
summary: The detection of object states in images (State Detection - SD) is a problem of both theoretical and practical importance and it is tightly interwoven with other important computer vision problems, such as action recognition and affordance detection. It is also highly relevant to any entity that needs to reason and act in dynamic domains, such as robotic systems and intelligent agents. Despite its importance, up to now, the research on this problem has been limited. In this paper, we attempt a systematic study of the SD problem. First, we introduce the Object State Detection Dataset (OSDD), a new publicly available dataset consisting of more than 19,000 annotations for 18 object categories and 9 state classes. Second, using a standard deep learning framework used for Object Detection (OD), we conduct a number of appropriately designed experiments, towards an in-depth study of the behavior of the SD problem. This study enables the setup of a baseline on the performance of SD, as well as its relative performance in comparison to OD, in a variety of scenarios. Overall, the experimental outcomes confirm that SD is harder than OD and that tailored SD methods need to be developed for addressing effectively this significant problem.
abstract_zh: 图像中对象状态的检测（状态检测 - SD）是一个具有理论和实践重要性的问题，它与其他重要的计算机视觉问题紧密交织在一起，例如动作识别和可供性检测。它还与任何需要在动态领域中推理和行动的实体（例如机器人系统和智能代理）高度相关。尽管它很重要，但迄今为止，对此问题的研究还很有限。在本文中，我们尝试对SD问题进行系统研究。首先，我们介绍对象状态检测数据集 (OSDD)，这是一个新的公开可用数据集，包含 18 个对象类别和 9 个状态类的 19,000 多个注释。其次，使用用于对象检测（OD）的标准深度学习框架，我们进行了一些适当设计的实验，以深入研究 SD 问题的行为。这项研究能够在各种场景下建立 SD 性能的基线，以及与 OD 相比的相对性能。总体而言，实验结果证实 SD 比 OD 更难，并且需要开发定制的 SD 方法来有效解决这一重大问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个新的物体状态检测数据集（OSDD），并通过实验比较状态检测（SD）与物体检测（OD）的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 物体状态检测在动态场景中具有重要意义，但现有研究不足，缺乏系统性分析和基准数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含18类物体和9种状态的OSDD数据集，并采用标准深度学习框架进行实验，对比SD与OD的性能表现。
AI.result: 实验表明SD比OD更具挑战性，现有OD方法难以直接解决SD问题，需开发专用方法。
AI.conclusion: 应针对SD问题设计专门方法，OSDD数据集为后续研究提供了基准。

authors_text: Junfeng Wu,Yi Jiang,Song Bai,Wenqing Zhang,Xiang Bai
title: SeqFormer: Sequential Transformer for Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: SeqFormer：用于视频实例分割的顺序转换器
abstract: In this work, we present SeqFormer for video instance segmentation. SeqFormer follows the principle of vision transformer that models instance relationships among video frames. Nevertheless, we observe that a stand-alone instance query suffices for capturing a time sequence of instances in a video, but attention mechanisms shall be done with each frame independently. To achieve this, SeqFormer locates an instance in each frame and aggregates temporal information to learn a powerful representation of a video-level instance, which is used to predict the mask sequences on each frame dynamically. Instance tracking is achieved naturally without tracking branches or post-processing. On YouTube-VIS, SeqFormer achieves 47.4 AP with a ResNet-50 backbone and 49.0 AP with a ResNet-101 backbone without bells and whistles. Such achievement significantly exceeds the previous state-of-the-art performance by 4.6 and 4.4, respectively. In addition, integrated with the recently-proposed Swin transformer, SeqFormer achieves a much higher AP of 59.3. We hope SeqFormer could be a strong baseline that fosters future research in video instance segmentation, and in the meantime, advances this field with a more robust, accurate, neat model. The code is available at https://github.com/wjf5203/SeqFormer.
summary: In this work, we present SeqFormer for video instance segmentation. SeqFormer follows the principle of vision transformer that models instance relationships among video frames. Nevertheless, we observe that a stand-alone instance query suffices for capturing a time sequence of instances in a video, but attention mechanisms shall be done with each frame independently. To achieve this, SeqFormer locates an instance in each frame and aggregates temporal information to learn a powerful representation of a video-level instance, which is used to predict the mask sequences on each frame dynamically. Instance tracking is achieved naturally without tracking branches or post-processing. On YouTube-VIS, SeqFormer achieves 47.4 AP with a ResNet-50 backbone and 49.0 AP with a ResNet-101 backbone without bells and whistles. Such achievement significantly exceeds the previous state-of-the-art performance by 4.6 and 4.4, respectively. In addition, integrated with the recently-proposed Swin transformer, SeqFormer achieves a much higher AP of 59.3. We hope SeqFormer could be a strong baseline that fosters future research in video instance segmentation, and in the meantime, advances this field with a more robust, accurate, neat model. The code is available at https://github.com/wjf5203/SeqFormer.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了用于视频实例分割的 SeqFormer。 SeqFormer 遵循视觉转换器的原理，对视频帧之间的实例关系进行建模。尽管如此，我们观察到独立的实例查询足以捕获视频中实例的时间序列，但注意机制应独立地对每个帧进行。为了实现这一目标，SeqFormer 在每个帧中定位一个实例并聚合时间信息以学习视频级实例的强大表示，该表示用于动态预测每个帧上的掩码序列。实例跟踪是自然实现的，无需跟踪分支或后处理。在 YouTube-VIS 上，SeqFormer 在 ResNet-50 主干上实现了 47.4 AP，在 ResNet-101 主干上实现了 49.0 AP，没有任何附加功能。这一成果分别显着超出了之前的最先进性能 4.6 和 4.4。此外，与最近提出的 Swin 变压器集成，SeqFormer 实现了更高的 AP 59.3。我们希望 SeqFormer 能够成为一个强有力的基线，促进视频实例分割的未来研究，同时以更强大、更准确、更简洁的模型推动这一领域的发展。代码可在 https://github.com/wjf5203/SeqFormer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeqFormer模型，用于视频实例分割任务，通过改进视觉Transformer架构来捕捉视频中实例的时序关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视频实例分割中难以高效建模时序信息，且依赖复杂跟踪模块。本文旨在设计无需额外跟踪分支即可自然实现实例跟踪的模型。
AI.method: SeqFormer采用独立帧间注意力机制，通过定位每帧实例并聚合时序信息，学习视频级实例表示，动态预测每帧的掩码序列。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS数据集上，SeqFormer在ResNet-50/101主干下分别达到47.4/49.0 AP，结合Swin Transformer后提升至59.3 AP，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SeqFormer为视频实例分割提供了鲁棒且高效的基准模型，其无需后处理的设计推动了该领域的发展。

authors_text: Yu Sun,Wu Liu,Qian Bao,Yili Fu,Tao Mei,Michael J. Black
title: Putting People in their Place: Monocular Regression of 3D People in Depth
title_zh: 将人放在自己的位置：深度 3D 人物的单目回归
abstract: Given an image with multiple people, our goal is to directly regress the pose and shape of all the people as well as their relative depth. Inferring the depth of a person in an image, however, is fundamentally ambiguous without knowing their height. This is particularly problematic when the scene contains people of very different sizes, e.g. from infants to adults. To solve this, we need several things. First, we develop a novel method to infer the poses and depth of multiple people in a single image. While previous work that estimates multiple people does so by reasoning in the image plane, our method, called BEV, adds an additional imaginary Bird's-Eye-View representation to explicitly reason about depth. BEV reasons simultaneously about body centers in the image and in depth and, by combing these, estimates 3D body position. Unlike prior work, BEV is a single-shot method that is end-to-end differentiable. Second, height varies with age, making it impossible to resolve depth without also estimating the age of people in the image. To do so, we exploit a 3D body model space that lets BEV infer shapes from infants to adults. Third, to train BEV, we need a new dataset. Specifically, we create a "Relative Human" (RH) dataset that includes age labels and relative depth relationships between the people in the images. Extensive experiments on RH and AGORA demonstrate the effectiveness of the model and training scheme. BEV outperforms existing methods on depth reasoning, child shape estimation, and robustness to occlusion. The code and dataset are released for research purposes.
summary: Given an image with multiple people, our goal is to directly regress the pose and shape of all the people as well as their relative depth. Inferring the depth of a person in an image, however, is fundamentally ambiguous without knowing their height. This is particularly problematic when the scene contains people of very different sizes, e.g. from infants to adults. To solve this, we need several things. First, we develop a novel method to infer the poses and depth of multiple people in a single image. While previous work that estimates multiple people does so by reasoning in the image plane, our method, called BEV, adds an additional imaginary Bird's-Eye-View representation to explicitly reason about depth. BEV reasons simultaneously about body centers in the image and in depth and, by combing these, estimates 3D body position. Unlike prior work, BEV is a single-shot method that is end-to-end differentiable. Second, height varies with age, making it impossible to resolve depth without also estimating the age of people in the image. To do so, we exploit a 3D body model space that lets BEV infer shapes from infants to adults. Third, to train BEV, we need a new dataset. Specifically, we create a "Relative Human" (RH) dataset that includes age labels and relative depth relationships between the people in the images. Extensive experiments on RH and AGORA demonstrate the effectiveness of the model and training scheme. BEV outperforms existing methods on depth reasoning, child shape estimation, and robustness to occlusion. The code and dataset are released for research purposes.
abstract_zh: 给定一张多人图像，我们的目标是直接回归所有人的姿势和形状以及他们的相对深度。然而，在不知道人的身高的情况下推断图像中人的深度基本上是不明确的。当场景包含体型差异很大的人时（例如，人），这尤其成问题。从婴儿到成人。为了解决这个问题，我们需要做几件事。首先，我们开发了一种新颖的方法来推断单个图像中多人的姿势和深度。虽然之前估计多人的工作是通过在图像平面中进行推理来实现的，但我们的方法（称为 BEV）添加了一个额外的假想鸟瞰图表示，以明确地推理深度。 BEV 同时推理图像中的身体中心和深度，并通过结合这些来估计 3D 身体位置。与之前的工作不同，BEV 是一种端到端可微分的单次方法。其次，身高随年龄而变化，因此如果不估计图像中人的年龄就无法解析深度。为此，我们利用 3D 身体模型空间，让 BEV 推断从婴儿到成人的形状。第三，为了训练 BEV，我们需要一个新的数据集。具体来说，我们创建了一个“相对人类”（RH）数据集，其中包括图像中人物之间的年龄标签和相对深度关系。在 RH 和 AGORA 上进行的大量实验证明了模型和训练方案的有效性。 BEV 在深度推理、子形状估计和遮挡鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。发布代码和数据集用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单目图像中多人3D姿态、形状及相对深度的回归方法，解决因身高差异导致的深度估计模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理图像中不同体型人物（如婴儿与成人）的深度估计，因身高差异导致深度推理存在根本性歧义。
AI.method: 提出BEV方法，通过引入鸟瞰图（BEV）表征联合推理图像平面与深度空间的躯干中心位置，并结合3D人体模型空间实现从婴儿到成人的形状估计，同时构建包含年龄标签和相对深度关系的RH数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在RH和AGORA数据集上实验表明，BEV在深度推理、儿童形状估计及遮挡鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: BEV通过整合鸟瞰图表征、年龄驱动的形状估计及专用数据集，有效解决了多人3D重建中的深度模糊问题。

authors_text: Renyu Zhu,Dongxiang Zhang,Chengcheng Han,Ming Gao,Xuesong Lu,Weining Qian,Aoying Zhou
title: Programming Knowledge Tracing: A Comprehensive Dataset and A New Model
title_zh: 编程知识追踪：综合数据集和新模型
abstract: In this paper, we study knowledge tracing in the domain of programming education and make two important contributions. First, we harvest and publish so far the most comprehensive dataset, namely BePKT, which covers various online behaviors in an OJ system, including programming text problems, knowledge annotations, user-submitted code and system-logged events. Second, we propose a new model PDKT to exploit the enriched context for accurate student behavior prediction. More specifically, we construct a bipartite graph for programming problem embedding, and design an improved pre-training model PLCodeBERT for code embedding, as well as a double-sequence RNN model with exponential decay attention for effective feature fusion. Experimental results on the new dataset BePKT show that our proposed model establishes state-of-the-art performance in programming knowledge tracing. In addition, we verify that our code embedding strategy based on PLCodeBERT is complementary to existing knowledge tracing models to further enhance their accuracy. As a side product, PLCodeBERT also results in better performance in other programming-related tasks such as code clone detection.
summary: In this paper, we study knowledge tracing in the domain of programming education and make two important contributions. First, we harvest and publish so far the most comprehensive dataset, namely BePKT, which covers various online behaviors in an OJ system, including programming text problems, knowledge annotations, user-submitted code and system-logged events. Second, we propose a new model PDKT to exploit the enriched context for accurate student behavior prediction. More specifically, we construct a bipartite graph for programming problem embedding, and design an improved pre-training model PLCodeBERT for code embedding, as well as a double-sequence RNN model with exponential decay attention for effective feature fusion. Experimental results on the new dataset BePKT show that our proposed model establishes state-of-the-art performance in programming knowledge tracing. In addition, we verify that our code embedding strategy based on PLCodeBERT is complementary to existing knowledge tracing models to further enhance their accuracy. As a side product, PLCodeBERT also results in better performance in other programming-related tasks such as code clone detection.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了编程教育领域的知识追踪，并做出了两个重要贡献。首先，我们收获并发布了迄今为止最全面的数据集，即BePKT，它涵盖了OJ系统中的各种在线行为，包括编程文本问题、知识注释、用户提交的代码和系统记录的事件。其次，我们提出了一种新模型 PDKT，以利用丰富的上下文来准确预测学生行为。更具体地说，我们构建了一个用于编程问题嵌入的二分图，并设计了一个用于代码嵌入的改进的预训练模型 PLCodeBERT，以及一个具有指数衰减注意的双序列 RNN 模型，用于有效的特征融合。新数据集 BePKT 上的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型在编程知识追踪方面建立了最先进的性能。此外，我们验证了基于 PLCodeBERT 的代码嵌入策略与现有知识追踪模型的补充，以进一步提高其准确性。作为副产品，PLCodeBERT 还可以在其他与编程相关的任务（例如代码克隆检测）中带来更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出编程知识追踪的全面数据集BePKT和新模型PDKT，以提高编程教育中的学生行为预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有编程教育知识追踪方法缺乏全面数据支持，且难以准确捕捉代码语义与学习行为的复杂关联。
AI.method: 构建包含编程文本、代码提交及系统日志的BePKT数据集；设计基于双图嵌入（编程问题-代码）、改进预训练模型PLCodeBERT及指数衰减注意力机制的PDKT模型。
AI.result: PDKT在BePKT数据集上达到SOTA性能，代码嵌入策略可提升现有模型准确率，PLCodeBERT在代码克隆检测等任务中亦表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据集与模型协同创新，显著提升了编程知识追踪效果，为教育AI提供了新方法与基础工具。

First, we harvest and publish so far the most comprehensive dataset, namely BePKT, which covers various online behaviors in an OJ system, including programming text problems, knowledge annotations, user-submitted code and system-logged events. In addition, we verify that our code embedding strategy based on PLCodeBERT is complementary to existing knowledge tracing models to further enhance their accuracy. authors_text: Eyke Hüllermeier
title: Prescriptive Machine Learning for Automated Decision Making: Challenges and Opportunities
title_zh: 用于自动决策的规范性机器学习：挑战和机遇
abstract: Recent applications of machine learning (ML) reveal a noticeable shift from its use for predictive modeling in the sense of a data-driven construction of models mainly used for the purpose of prediction (of ground-truth facts) to its use for prescriptive modeling. What is meant by this is the task of learning a model that stipulates appropriate decisions about the right course of action in real-world scenarios: Which medical therapy should be applied? Should this person be hired for the job? As argued in this article, prescriptive modeling comes with new technical conditions for learning and new demands regarding reliability, responsibility, and the ethics of decision making. Therefore, to support the data-driven design of decision-making agents that act in a rational but at the same time responsible manner, a rigorous methodological foundation of prescriptive ML is needed. The purpose of this short paper is to elaborate on specific characteristics of prescriptive ML and to highlight some key challenges it implies. Besides, drawing connections to other branches of contemporary AI research, the grounding of prescriptive ML in a (generalized) decision-theoretic framework is advocated.
summary: Recent applications of machine learning (ML) reveal a noticeable shift from its use for predictive modeling in the sense of a data-driven construction of models mainly used for the purpose of prediction (of ground-truth facts) to its use for prescriptive modeling. What is meant by this is the task of learning a model that stipulates appropriate decisions about the right course of action in real-world scenarios: Which medical therapy should be applied? Should this person be hired for the job? As argued in this article, prescriptive modeling comes with new technical conditions for learning and new demands regarding reliability, responsibility, and the ethics of decision making. Therefore, to support the data-driven design of decision-making agents that act in a rational but at the same time responsible manner, a rigorous methodological foundation of prescriptive ML is needed. The purpose of this short paper is to elaborate on specific characteristics of prescriptive ML and to highlight some key challenges it implies. Besides, drawing connections to other branches of contemporary AI research, the grounding of prescriptive ML in a (generalized) decision-theoretic framework is advocated.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 的最新应用揭示了从主要用于预测（真实事实）目的的数据驱动模型构建意义上的预测建模到规范建模的使用的显着转变。这意味着学习一个模型的任务，该模型规定了现实世界场景中正确行动方案的适当决策：应该采用哪种药物治疗？应该雇用这个人来做这份工作吗？正如本文所述，规范性建模带来了新的学习技术条件以及关于决策的可靠性、责任和道德的新要求。因此，为了支持以理性但同时负责任的方式行事的决策代理的数据驱动设计，需要规范性机器学习的严格方法论基础。这篇短文的目的是详细阐述规范性机器学习的具体特征，并强调它所带来的一些关键挑战。此外，通过与当代人工智能研究的其他分支建立联系，提倡将规范性机器学习建立在（广义）决策理论框架中。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了处方机器学习（Prescriptive ML）在自动化决策中的特点、挑战与机遇，并倡导将其嵌入决策理论框架以应对伦理与技术难题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习侧重预测，而处方ML需直接指导决策（如医疗方案选择），涉及可靠性、责任与伦理问题，亟需方法论支持。
AI.method: 通过文献分析与理论框架构建，结合决策理论，梳理处方ML的技术需求与跨学科联系。
AI.result: 明确了处方ML的核心特征与关键挑战，提出需在决策理论基础上建立严谨方法论，并指出与AI其他分支的协同方向。
AI.conclusion: 处方ML需兼顾理性决策与伦理责任，未来研究应聚焦方法论体系构建及跨领域整合以实现负责任的自动化决策。

search_text: Prescriptive Machine Learning for Automated Decision Making: Challenges and Opportunities 用于自动决策的规范性机器学习：挑战和机遇 Recent applications of machine learning (ML) reveal a noticeable shift from its use for predictive modeling in the sense of a data-driven construction of models mainly used for the purpose of prediction (of ground-truth facts) to its use for prescriptive modeling. What is meant by this is the task of learning a model that stipulates appropriate decisions about the right course of action in real-world scenarios: Which medical therapy should be applied? Should this person be hired for the job? As argued in this article, prescriptive modeling comes with new technical conditions for learning and new demands regarding reliability, responsibility, and the ethics of decision making. Therefore, to support the data-driven design of decision-making agents that act in a rational but at the same time responsible manner, a rigorous methodological foundation of prescriptive ML is needed. The purpose of this short paper is to elaborate on specific characteristics of prescriptive ML and to highlight some key challenges it implies. Besides, drawing connections to other branches of contemporary AI research, the grounding of prescriptive ML in a (generalized) decision-theoretic framework is advocated. 机器学习 (ML) 的最新应用揭示了从主要用于预测（真实事实）目的的数据驱动模型构建意义上的预测建模到规范建模的使用的显着转变。这意味着学习一个模型的任务，该模型规定了现实世界场景中正确行动方案的适当决策：应该采用哪种药物治疗？应该雇用这个人来做这份工作吗？正如本文所述，规范性建模带来了新的学习技术条件以及关于决策的可靠性、责任和道德的新要求。因此，为了支持以理性但同时负责任的方式行事的决策代理的数据驱动设计，需要规范性机器学习的严格方法论基础。这篇短文的目的是详细阐述规范性机器学习的具体特征，并强调它所带来的一些关键挑战。此外，通过与当代人工智能研究的其他分支建立联系，提倡将规范性机器学习建立在（广义）决策理论框架中。 本文探讨了处方机器学习（Prescriptive ML）在自动化决策中的特点、挑战与机遇，并倡导将其嵌入决策理论框架以应对伦理与技术难题。 Eyke Hüllermeier cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Juan Camilo Vasquez-Correa,Juan Carlos Guerrero-Sierra,Jose Luis Pemberty-Tamayo,Juan Esteban Jaramillo,Andres Felipe Tejada-Castro
title: One System to Rule them All: a Universal Intent Recognition System for Customer Service Chatbots
title_zh: 一个系统统领一切：用于客户服务聊天机器人的通用意图识别系统
abstract: Customer service chatbots are conversational systems designed to provide information to customers about products/services offered by different companies. Particularly, intent recognition is one of the core components in the natural language understating capabilities of a chatbot system. Among the different intents that a chatbot is trained to recognize, there is a set of them that is universal to any customer service chatbot. Universal intents may include salutation, switch the conversation to a human agent, farewells, among others. A system to recognize those universal intents will be very helpful to optimize the training process of specific customer service chatbots. We propose the development of a universal intent recognition system, which is trained to recognize a selected group of 11 intents that are common in 28 different chatbots. The proposed system is trained considering state-of-the-art word-embedding models such as word2vec and BERT, and deep classifiers based on convolutional and recurrent neural networks. The proposed model is able to discriminate between those universal intents with a balanced accuracy up to 80.4\%. In addition, the proposed system is equally accurate to recognize intents expressed both in short and long text requests. At the same time, misclassification errors often occurs between intents with very similar semantic fields such as farewells and positive comments. The proposed system will be very helpful to optimize the training process of a customer service chatbot because some of the intents will be already available and detected by our system. At the same time, the proposed approach will be a suitable base model to train more specific chatbots by applying transfer learning strategies.

The proposed system is trained considering state-of-the-art word-embedding models such as word2vec and BERT, and deep classifiers based on convolutional and recurrent neural networks. The proposed model is able to discriminate between those universal intents with a balanced accuracy up to 80.4\%. In addition, the proposed system is equally accurate to recognize intents expressed both in short and long text requests. At the same time, misclassification errors often occurs between intents with very similar semantic fields such as farewells and positive comments. The proposed system will be very helpful to optimize the training process of a customer service chatbot because some of the intents will be already available and detected by our system. At the same time, the proposed approach will be a suitable base model to train more specific chatbots by applying transfer learning strategies.
abstract_zh: 客户服务聊天机器人是对话系统，旨在向客户提供有关不同公司提供的产品/服务的信息。特别是，意图识别是自然语言理解聊天机器人系统功能的核心组件之一。在聊天机器人经过训练可识别的不同意图中，有一组对于任何客户服务聊天机器人都是通用的。普遍意图可能包括问候、将对话转给人工代理、告别等。识别这些普遍意图的系统将非常有助于优化特定客户服务聊天机器人的培训过程。我们建议开发一个通用意图识别系统，该系统经过训练可以识别 28 个不同聊天机器人中常见的 11 种选定意图。该系统的训练考虑了最先进的词嵌入模型（例如 word2vec 和 BERT）以及基于卷积和递归神经网络的深度分类器。所提出的模型能够区分这些普遍意图，平衡准确度高达 80.4%。此外，所提出的系统同样准确地识别短文本请求和长文本请求中表达的意图。同时，在语义领域非常相似的意图（例如告别和正面评论）之间经常发生错误分类错误。所提出的系统对于优化客户服务聊天机器人的培训过程将非常有帮助，因为我们的系统已经可以使用并检测到一些意图。同时，所提出的方法将是一个合适的基础模型，可以通过应用迁移学习策略来训练更具体的聊天机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用意图识别系统，用于优化客户服务聊天机器人的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 不同公司的客服聊天机器人存在大量重复的通用意图（如问候、转人工、告别等），单独训练效率低下，需共享通用模型以提升效率。
AI.method: 基于word2vec和BERT词向量模型，结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）构建深度分类器，训练识别28个聊天机器人中共有的11种意图。
AI.result: 系统在平衡准确率上达到80.4%，可处理长短文本，但相似语义意图（如告别与好评）易误分类。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可作为客服机器人训练的基础模型，通过迁移学习策略提升特定场景的模型开发效率。

authors_text: Arianna Falbo,Travis LaCroix
title: Est-ce que vous compute? Code-switching, cultural identity, and AI
title_zh: 你计算的是什么？语码转换、文化认同和人工智能
comment: 19 pages. Under Review. Please cite published version, if available
comments: 19 pages. Under Review. Please cite published version, if available
abstract: Cultural code-switching concerns how we adjust our overall behaviours, manners of speaking, and appearance in response to a perceived change in our social environment. We defend the need to investigate cultural code-switching capacities in artificial intelligence systems. We explore a series of ethical and epistemic issues that arise when bringing cultural code-switching to bear on artificial intelligence. Building upon Dotson's (2014) analysis of testimonial smothering, we discuss how emerging technologies in AI can give rise to epistemic oppression, and specifically, a form of self-silencing that we call 'cultural smothering'. By leaving the socio-dynamic features of cultural code-switching unaddressed, AI systems risk negatively impacting already-marginalised social groups by widening opportunity gaps and further entrenching social inequalities.
summary: Cultural code-switching concerns how we adjust our overall behaviours, manners of speaking, and appearance in response to a perceived change in our social environment. We defend the need to investigate cultural code-switching capacities in artificial intelligence systems. We explore a series of ethical and epistemic issues that arise when bringing cultural code-switching to bear on artificial intelligence. Building upon Dotson's (2014) analysis of testimonial smothering, we discuss how emerging technologies in AI can give rise to epistemic oppression, and specifically, a form of self-silencing that we call 'cultural smothering'. By leaving the socio-dynamic features of cultural code-switching unaddressed, AI systems risk negatively impacting already-marginalised social groups by widening opportunity gaps and further entrenching social inequalities.
abstract_zh: 文化语码转换涉及我们如何调整我们的整体行为、说话方式和外表，以应对社会环境的感知变化。我们主张研究人工智能系统中文化语码转换能力的必要性。我们探讨了将文化代码转换应用于人工智能时出现的一系列伦理和认知问题。基于 Dotson（2014）对证言窒息的分析，我们讨论了人工智能中的新兴技术如何引起认知压迫，特别是一种我们称之为“文化窒息”的自我沉默形式。如果不解决文化语码转换的社会动态特征，人工智能系统可能会扩大机会差距并进一步加剧社会不平等，从而对已经边缘化的社会群体产生负面影响。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在人工智能系统中融入文化代码切换能力的重要性，并分析其引发的伦理与认识论问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统忽视文化代码切换的社会动态特征，可能导致边缘群体进一步被边缘化，加剧社会不平等。
AI.method: 基于Dotson（2014）的‘证言压抑’理论，分析AI技术如何导致认识论压迫，并提出‘文化压抑’概念进行讨论。
AI.result: AI系统若忽略文化代码切换，可能通过自我沉默机制扩大机会差距，加深社会不平等现象。
AI.conclusion: 需在AI设计中纳入文化代码切换的动态特性，以避免技术加剧社会不公，推动更包容的智能系统发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨在人工智能系统中融入文化代码切换能力的重要性，并分析其引发的伦理与认识论问题。

search_text: Est-ce que vous compute? Code-switching, cultural identity, and AI 你计算的是什么？语码转换、文化认同和人工智能 Cultural code-switching concerns how we adjust our overall behaviours, manners of speaking, and appearance in response to a perceived change in our social environment. We defend the need to investigate cultural code-switching capacities in artificial intelligence systems. We explore a series of ethical and epistemic issues that arise when bringing cultural code-switching to bear on artificial intelligence. Building upon Dotson's (2014) analysis of testimonial smothering, we discuss how emerging technologies in AI can give rise to epistemic oppression, and specifically, a form of self-silencing that we call 'cultural smothering'. By leaving the socio-dynamic features of cultural code-switching unaddressed, AI systems risk negatively impacting already-marginalised social groups by widening opportunity gaps and further entrenching social inequalities. 文化语码转换涉及我们如何调整我们的整体行为、说话方式和外表，以应对社会环境的感知变化。我们主张研究人工智能系统中文化语码转换能力的必要性。我们探讨了将文化代码转换应用于人工智能时出现的一系列伦理和认知问题。基于 Dotson（2014）对证言窒息的分析，我们讨论了人工智能中的新兴技术如何引起认知压迫，特别是一种我们称之为“文化窒息”的自我沉默形式。如果不解决文化语码转换的社会动态特征，人工智能系统可能会扩大机会差距并进一步加剧社会不平等，从而对已经边缘化的社会群体产生负面影响。 本文探讨在人工智能系统中融入文化代码切换能力的重要性，并分析其引发的伦理与认识论问题。 Arianna Falbo,Travis LaCroix cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Zhiqi Lee,Sumin Qi,Chongchong Fan,Ziwei Xie
title: RA V-Net: Deep learning network for automated liver segmentation
title_zh: RA V-Net：用于自动肝脏分割的深度学习网络
abstract: Accurate segmentation of the liver is a prerequisite for the diagnosis of disease. Automated segmentation is an important application of computer-aided detection and diagnosis of liver disease. In recent years, automated processing of medical images has gained breakthroughs. However, the low contrast of abdominal scan CT images and the complexity of liver morphology make accurate automatic segmentation challenging. In this paper, we propose RA V-Net, which is an improved medical image automatic segmentation model based on U-Net. It has the following three main innovations. CofRes Module (Composite Original Feature Residual Module) is proposed. With more complex convolution layers and skip connections to make it obtain a higher level of image feature extraction capability and prevent gradient disappearance or explosion. AR Module (Attention Recovery Module) is proposed to reduce the computational effort of the model. In addition, the spatial features between the data pixels of the encoding and decoding modules are sensed by adjusting the channels and LSTM convolution. Finally, the image features are effectively retained. CA Module (Channel Attention Module) is introduced, which used to extract relevant channels with dependencies and strengthen them by matrix dot product, while weakening irrelevant channels without dependencies. The purpose of channel attention is achieved. The attention mechanism provided by LSTM convolution and CA Module are strong guarantees for the performance of the neural network. The accuracy of U-Net network: 0.9862, precision: 0.9118, DSC: 0.8547, JSC: 0.82. The evaluation metrics of RA V-Net, accuracy: 0.9968, precision: 0.9597, DSC: 0.9654, JSC: 0.9414. The most representative metric for the segmentation effect is DSC, which improves 0.1107 over U-Net, and JSC improves 0.1214.
summary: Accurate segmentation of the liver is a prerequisite for the diagnosis of disease. Automated segmentation is an important application of computer-aided detection and diagnosis of liver disease. In recent years, automated processing of medical images has gained breakthroughs. However, the low contrast of abdominal scan CT images and the complexity of liver morphology make accurate automatic segmentation challenging. In this paper, we propose RA V-Net, which is an improved medical image automatic segmentation model based on U-Net. It has the following three main innovations. CofRes Module (Composite Original Feature Residual Module) is proposed. With more complex convolution layers and skip connections to make it obtain a higher level of image feature extraction capability and prevent gradient disappearance or explosion. AR Module (Attention Recovery Module) is proposed to reduce the computational effort of the model. In addition, the spatial features between the data pixels of the encoding and decoding modules are sensed by adjusting the channels and LSTM convolution. Finally, the image features are effectively retained. CA Module (Channel Attention Module) is introduced, which used to extract relevant channels with dependencies and strengthen them by matrix dot product, while weakening irrelevant channels without dependencies. The purpose of channel attention is achieved. The attention mechanism provided by LSTM convolution and CA Module are strong guarantees for the performance of the neural network. The accuracy of U-Net network: 0.9862, precision: 0.9118, DSC: 0.8547, JSC: 0.82. The evaluation metrics of RA V-Net, accuracy: 0.9968, precision: 0.9597, DSC: 0.9654, JSC: 0.9414. The most representative metric for the segmentation effect is DSC, which improves 0.1107 over U-Net, and JSC improves 0.1214.
abstract_zh: 肝脏的准确分割是疾病诊断的先决条件。自动分割是计算机辅助肝病检测和诊断的重要应用。近年来，医学图像的自动化处理取得了突破。然而，腹部扫描CT图像的低对比度和肝脏形态的复杂性给精确的自动分割带来了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了RA V-Net，这是一种基于U-Net的改进的医学图像自动分割模型。其主要创新点有以下三点。提出了CofRes模块（复合原始特征残差模块）。具有更复杂的卷积层和跳跃连接使其获得更高水平的图像特征提取能力并防止梯度消失或爆炸。 AR模块（注意力恢复模块）的提出是为了减少模型的计算量。此外，通过调整通道和LSTM卷积来感知编码和解码模块的数据像素之间的空间特征。最终有效保留了图像特征。引入了CA模块（Channel Attention Module），用于提取有依赖关系的相关通道，并通过矩阵点积对其进行强化，同时弱化没有依赖关系的不相关通道。渠道关注的目的就达到了。 LSTM卷积和CA Module提供的注意力机制是神经网络性能的有力保证。 U-Net网络的准确率：0.9862，精度：0.9118，DSC：0.8547，JSC：0.82。 RA V-Net的评估指标，准确率：0.9968，精度：0.9597，DSC：0.9654，JSC：0.9414。分割效果最具代表性的指标是DSC，比U-Net提高了0.1107，JSC提高了0.1214。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RA V-Net模型，通过改进U-Net架构实现更精确的肝脏CT图像自动分割。
AI.motivation: 腹部CT图像对比度低且肝脏形态复杂，导致传统自动分割方法精度不足，需改进网络结构以提升分割效果。
AI.method: 设计包含CofRes模块（增强特征提取能力）、AR模块（结合LSTM卷积优化空间特征）和CA模块（通道注意力机制）的RA V-Net模型，通过残差连接、通道依赖强化等技术提升性能。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上，RA V-Net的DSC指标达到0.9654（较U-Net提升0.1107），JSC指标达0.9414（提升0.1214），准确率和精确率分别提升至0.9968和0.9597。
AI.conclusion: RA V-Net通过多模块协同优化显著提升了肝脏分割精度，验证了改进的特征提取与注意力机制在医学图像分割中的有效性。

authors_text: Nathan Hubens,Matei Mancas,Bernard Gosselin,Marius Preda,Titus Zaharia
title: An Experimental Study of the Impact of Pre-training on the Pruning of a Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 预训练对卷积神经网络剪枝影响的实验研究
abstract: In recent years, deep neural networks have known a wide success in various application domains. However, they require important computational and memory resources, which severely hinders their deployment, notably on mobile devices or for real-time applications. Neural networks usually involve a large number of parameters, which correspond to the weights of the network. Such parameters, obtained with the help of a training process, are determinant for the performance of the network. However, they are also highly redundant. The pruning methods notably attempt to reduce the size of the parameter set, by identifying and removing the irrelevant weights. In this paper, we examine the impact of the training strategy on the pruning efficiency. Two training modalities are considered and compared: (1) fine-tuned and (2) from scratch. The experimental results obtained on four datasets (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, SVHN and Caltech101) and for two different CNNs (VGG16 and MobileNet) demonstrate that a network that has been pre-trained on a large corpus (e.g. ImageNet) and then fine-tuned on a particular dataset can be pruned much more efficiently (up to 80% of parameter reduction) than the same network trained from scratch.
summary: In recent years, deep neural networks have known a wide success in various application domains. However, they require important computational and memory resources, which severely hinders their deployment, notably on mobile devices or for real-time applications. Neural networks usually involve a large number of parameters, which correspond to the weights of the network. Such parameters, obtained with the help of a training process, are determinant for the performance of the network. However, they are also highly redundant. The pruning methods notably attempt to reduce the size of the parameter set, by identifying and removing the irrelevant weights. In this paper, we examine the impact of the training strategy on the pruning efficiency. Two training modalities are considered and compared: (1) fine-tuned and (2) from scratch. The experimental results obtained on four datasets (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, SVHN and Caltech101) and for two different CNNs (VGG16 and MobileNet) demonstrate that a network that has been pre-trained on a large corpus (e.g. ImageNet) and then fine-tuned on a particular dataset can be pruned much more efficiently (up to 80% of parameter reduction) than the same network trained from scratch.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络在各个应用领域取得了广泛的成功。然而，它们需要重要的计算和内存资源，这严重阻碍了它们的部署，特别是在移动设备或实时应用程序上。神经网络通常涉及大量参数，这些参数对应于网络的权重。在训练过程的帮助下获得的这些参数决定了网络的性能。然而，它们也是高度冗余的。剪枝方法特别试图通过识别和删除不相关的权重来减小参数集的大小。在本文中，我们研究了训练策略对剪枝效率的影响。考虑并比较了两种培训方式：（1）微调和（2）从头开始。在四个数据集（CIFAR10、CIFAR100、SVHN 和 Caltech101）和两个不同 CNN（VGG16 和 MobileNet）上获得的实验结果表明，与从头开始训练的相同网络相比，在大型语料库（例如 ImageNet）上进行预训练然后在特定数据集上进行微调的网络可以更有效地进行修剪（参数减少高达 80%）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预训练对卷积神经网络剪枝效率的影响，比较了微调和从零训练两种策略的剪枝效果。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在移动端和实时应用中面临计算与内存资源限制，剪枝可减少冗余参数，但训练策略对剪枝效率的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100等四个数据集和VGG16、MobileNet两种网络上，对比了预训练微调与从零训练的剪枝效果。
AI.result: 预训练微调网络可实现高达80%的参数剪枝，且性能损失较小，优于从零训练的剪枝效果。
AI.conclusion: 预训练微调显著提升CNN剪枝效率，为资源受限场景下的模型部署提供了有效方法。
