Advances in machine learning have highlighted an alternative to traditional acoustic features, namely pre-trained learnt extractors. Here, we present an approach building on these developments: leveraging a feature extractor based on a deep neural network trained on over 10,000 human voice prints to provide an informative space over which we identify chimpanzee voice prints. We compare our results with those obtained by using traditional acoustic features and discuss the benefits of our methodology and the significance of our findings for the identification of "voice prints" in non-human animals. 个体声音差异在动物王国中普遍存在。在人类中，这些差异遍布整个声乐曲目并构成“声纹”。猿类是我们现存最近的亲戚，在特定的呼叫类型中拥有个体特征，但独特声纹的潜力却很少被研究。这部分归因于从小数据集中提取有意义的特征相关的限制。机器学习的进步凸显了传统声学特征的替代方案，即预先训练的学习提取器。在这里，我们提出了一种基于这些进展的方法：利用基于深度神经网络的特征提取器，该神经网络经过 10,000 多个人类声纹的训练，为我们识别黑猩猩声纹提供信息空间。我们将我们的结果与使用传统声学特征获得的结果进行比较，并讨论我们的方法的好处以及我们的发现对于识别非人类动物中的“声纹”的重要性。 本文通过迁移学习方法，利用人类声音指纹的深度神经网络特征提取器，探索黑猩猩是否存在类似的声音指纹。 Mael Leroux,Orestes Gutierrez Al-Khudhairy,Nicolas Perony,Simon W. Townsend cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Bowen Yang,Cong Han,Yu Li,Lei Zuo,Zhou Yu
title: Improving Conversational Recommendation Systems' Quality with Context-Aware Item Meta Information
title_zh: 利用上下文感知项目元信息提高会话推荐系统的质量
abstract: Conversational recommendation systems (CRS) engage with users by inferring user preferences from dialog history, providing accurate recommendations, and generating appropriate responses. Previous CRSs use knowledge graph (KG) based recommendation modules and integrate KG with language models for response generation. Although KG-based approaches prove effective, two issues remain to be solved. First, KG-based approaches ignore the information in the conversational context but only rely on entity relations and bag of words to recommend items. Second, it requires substantial engineering efforts to maintain KGs that model domain-specific relations, thus leading to less flexibility. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective architecture comprising a pre-trained language model (PLM) and an item metadata encoder. The encoder learns to map item metadata to embeddings that can reflect the semantic information in the dialog context. The PLM then consumes the semantic-aligned item embeddings together with dialog context to generate high-quality recommendations and responses. Instead of modeling entity relations with KGs, our model reduces engineering complexity by directly converting each item to an embedding. Experimental results on the benchmark dataset ReDial show that our model obtains state-of-the-art results on both recommendation and response generation tasks.
summary: Conversational recommendation systems (CRS) engage with users by inferring user preferences from dialog history, providing accurate recommendations, and generating appropriate responses. Previous CRSs use knowledge graph (KG) based recommendation modules and integrate KG with language models for response generation. Although KG-based approaches prove effective, two issues remain to be solved. First, KG-based approaches ignore the information in the conversational context but only rely on entity relations and bag of words to recommend items. Second, it requires substantial engineering efforts to maintain KGs that model domain-specific relations, thus leading to less flexibility. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective architecture comprising a pre-trained language model (PLM) and an item metadata encoder. The encoder learns to map item metadata to embeddings that can reflect the semantic information in the dialog context. The PLM then consumes the semantic-aligned item embeddings together with dialog context to generate high-quality recommendations and responses. Instead of modeling entity relations with KGs, our model reduces engineering complexity by directly converting each item to an embedding. Experimental results on the benchmark dataset ReDial show that our model obtains state-of-the-art results on both recommendation and response generation tasks.
abstract_zh: 对话式推荐系统 (CRS) 通过从对话历史推断用户偏好、提供准确的推荐并生成适当的响应来与用户互动。以前的 CRS 使用基于知识图（KG）的推荐模块，并将 KG 与语言模型集成以生成响应。尽管基于知识图谱的方法被证明是有效的，但仍有两个问题有待解决。首先，基于知识图谱的方法忽略了会话上下文中的信息，而仅依靠实体关系和词袋来推荐项目。其次，需要大量的工程工作来维护对特定领域关系进行建模的知识图谱，从而导致灵活性降低。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的架构，包括预训练语言模型（PLM）和项目元数据编码器。编码器学习将项目元数据映射到可以反映对话上下文中的语义信息的嵌入。然后，PLM 将语义对齐的项目嵌入与对话上下文一起使用，以生成高质量的建议和响应。我们的模型不是使用知识图谱对实体关系进行建模，而是通过直接将每个项目转换为嵌入来降低工程复杂性。基准数据集 ReDial 上的实验结果表明，我们的模型在推荐和响应生成任务上都获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合预训练语言模型和物品元数据编码器的架构，以解决对话推荐系统中知识图谱方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于知识图谱的对话推荐系统存在两个问题：忽略对话上下文信息，且维护领域知识图谱需要大量工程成本。
AI.method: 设计预训练语言模型与物品元数据编码器结合的架构，通过编码器将物品元数据映射为语义嵌入，再与对话上下文结合生成推荐和响应。
AI.result: 在ReDial数据集上，该模型在推荐和响应生成任务中均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过直接转换物品为嵌入降低工程复杂度，同时利用上下文语义信息提升推荐质量。

authors_text: Heng Zhang
title: Characterizing the Program Expressive Power of Existential Rule Languages
title_zh: 表征存在规则语言的程序表达能力
comment: The full version of a paper to be published in AAAI-22
comments: The full version of a paper to be published in AAAI-22
abstract: Existential rule languages are a family of ontology languages that have been widely used in ontology-mediated query answering (OMQA). However, for most of them, the expressive power of representing domain knowledge for OMQA, known as the program expressive power, is not well-understood yet. In this paper, we establish a number of novel characterizations for the program expressive power of several important existential rule languages, including tuple-generating dependencies (TGDs), linear TGDs, as well as disjunctive TGDs. The characterizations employ natural model-theoretic properties, and automata-theoretic properties sometimes, which thus provide powerful tools for identifying the definability of domain knowledge for OMQA in these languages.
summary: Existential rule languages are a family of ontology languages that have been widely used in ontology-mediated query answering (OMQA). However, for most of them, the expressive power of representing domain knowledge for OMQA, known as the program expressive power, is not well-understood yet. In this paper, we establish a number of novel characterizations for the program expressive power of several important existential rule languages, including tuple-generating dependencies (TGDs), linear TGDs, as well as disjunctive TGDs. The characterizations employ natural model-theoretic properties, and automata-theoretic properties sometimes, which thus provide powerful tools for identifying the definability of domain knowledge for OMQA in these languages.
abstract_zh: 存在规则语言是本体语言家族，已广泛应用于本体介导的查询应答（OMQA）中。然而，对于大多数人来说，OMQA 表示领域知识的表达能力，即程序表达能力，还没有得到很好的理解。在本文中，我们为几种重要的存在规则语言的程序表达能力建立了许多新颖的表征，包括元组生成依赖关系（TGD）、线性 TGD 以及析取 TGD。这些表征采用自然模型理论属性，有时还采用自动机理论属性，从而为识别这些语言中 OMQA 领域知识的可定义性提供了强大的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究存在性规则语言在本体中介查询回答中的程序表达能力，并建立其特征化分析。
AI.motivation: 存在性规则语言虽被广泛用于本体中介查询回答，但其表达能力尚未被充分理解，限制了相关应用的发展。
AI.method: 通过引入模型论和自动机理论的性质，对多种存在性规则语言（如TGDs）进行形式化特征分析。
AI.result: 提出了针对TGDs、线性TGDs和析取TGDs等语言的新型特征化方法，为领域知识的可定义性判断提供了理论工具。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解存在性规则语言的表达能力提供了理论框架，有助于推动本体中介查询回答技术的进一步发展。

authors_text: Yu Wang,Jingyang Lin,Jingjing Zou,Yingwei Pan,Ting Yao,Tao Mei
title: Improving Self-supervised Learning with Automated Unsupervised Outlier Arbitration
title_zh: 通过自动无监督异常仲裁改善自我监督学习
comment: NeurIPS 2021; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/ssl-codelab/uota
comments: NeurIPS 2021; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/ssl-codelab/uota
abstract: Our work reveals a structured shortcoming of the existing mainstream self-supervised learning methods. Whereas self-supervised learning frameworks usually take the prevailing perfect instance level invariance hypothesis for granted, we carefully investigate the pitfalls behind. Particularly, we argue that the existing augmentation pipeline for generating multiple positive views naturally introduces out-of-distribution (OOD) samples that undermine the learning of the downstream tasks. Generating diverse positive augmentations on the input does not always pay off in benefiting downstream tasks. To overcome this inherent deficiency, we introduce a lightweight latent variable model UOTA, targeting the view sampling issue for self-supervised learning. UOTA adaptively searches for the most important sampling region to produce views, and provides viable choice for outlier-robust self-supervised learning approaches. Our method directly generalizes to many mainstream self-supervised learning approaches, regardless of the loss's nature contrastive or not. We empirically show UOTA's advantage over the state-of-the-art self-supervised paradigms with evident margin, which well justifies the existence of the OOD sample issue embedded in the existing approaches. Especially, we theoretically prove that the merits of the proposal boil down to guaranteed estimator variance and bias reduction. Code is available: at https://github.com/ssl-codelab/uota.
summary: Our work reveals a structured shortcoming of the existing mainstream self-supervised learning methods. Whereas self-supervised learning frameworks usually take the prevailing perfect instance level invariance hypothesis for granted, we carefully investigate the pitfalls behind. Particularly, we argue that the existing augmentation pipeline for generating multiple positive views naturally introduces out-of-distribution (OOD) samples that undermine the learning of the downstream tasks. Generating diverse positive augmentations on the input does not always pay off in benefiting downstream tasks. To overcome this inherent deficiency, we introduce a lightweight latent variable model UOTA, targeting the view sampling issue for self-supervised learning. UOTA adaptively searches for the most important sampling region to produce views, and provides viable choice for outlier-robust self-supervised learning approaches. Our method directly generalizes to many mainstream self-supervised learning approaches, regardless of the loss's nature contrastive or not. We empirically show UOTA's advantage over the state-of-the-art self-supervised paradigms with evident margin, which well justifies the existence of the OOD sample issue embedded in the existing approaches. Especially, we theoretically prove that the merits of the proposal boil down to guaranteed estimator variance and bias reduction. Code is available: at https://github.com/ssl-codelab/uota.
abstract_zh: 我们的工作揭示了现有主流自我监督学习方法的结构性缺陷。尽管自监督学习框架通常将流行的完美实例级不变性假设视为理所当然，但我们仔细研究了背后的陷阱。特别是，我们认为现有的用于生成多个正面视图的增强管道自然会引入分布外（OOD）样本，从而破坏下游任务的学习。对输入产生不同的积极增强并不总是能够使下游任务受益。为了克服这一固有缺陷，我们引入了一种轻量级潜变量模型 UOTA，针对自监督学习的视图采样问题。 UOTA 自适应地搜索最重要的采样区域来生成视图，并为异常值稳健的自监督学习方法提供可行的选择。我们的方法直接推广到许多主流的自监督学习方法，无论损失的性质是否具有对比性。我们凭经验证明了 UOTA 相对于最先进的自我监督范式的优势，并具有明显的优势，这很好地证明了现有方法中嵌入的 OOD 样本问题的存在。特别是，我们从理论上证明了该提案的优点可以归结为保证估计方差和偏差减少。代码可用：https://github.com/ssl-codelab/uota。

AI.tldr: 本文针对自监督学习中因数据增强引入的分布外样本问题，提出轻量级潜在变量模型UOTA以改进视图采样策略。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法假设数据增强生成的正样本符合分布，但实际增强过程可能引入分布外样本，损害下游任务性能。
AI.method: 设计UOTA模型通过自适应搜索关键采样区域生成视图，直接兼容各类自监督学习框架（对比或非对比损失）。
AI.result: 实验显示UOTA在多个任务中显著优于现有方法，理论证明其能保证估计器方差与偏差的降低。
AI.conclusion: UOTA有效解决了自监督学习中的分布外样本问题，为鲁棒的视图生成提供了通用解决方案。

search_text: Improving Self-supervised Learning with Automated Unsupervised Outlier Arbitration 通过自动无监督异常仲裁改善自我监督学习 Our work reveals a structured shortcoming of the existing mainstream self-supervised learning methods. Whereas self-supervised learning frameworks usually take the prevailing perfect instance level invariance hypothesis for granted, we carefully investigate the pitfalls behind. Particularly, we argue that the existing augmentation pipeline for generating multiple positive views naturally introduces out-of-distribution (OOD) samples that undermine the learning of the downstream tasks. Generating diverse positive augmentations on the input does not always pay off in benefiting downstream tasks. To overcome this inherent deficiency, we introduce a lightweight latent variable model UOTA, targeting the view sampling issue for self-supervised learning. UOTA adaptively searches for the most important sampling region to produce views, and provides viable choice for outlier-robust self-supervised learning approaches. Our method directly generalizes to many mainstream self-supervised learning approaches, regardless of the loss's nature contrastive or not. We empirically show UOTA's advantage over the state-of-the-art self-supervised paradigms with evident margin, which well justifies the existence of the OOD sample issue embedded in the existing approaches. Especially, we theoretically prove that the merits of the proposal boil down to guaranteed estimator variance and bias reduction. Code is available: at https://github.com/ssl-codelab/uota. 我们的工作揭示了现有主流自我监督学习方法的结构性缺陷。尽管自监督学习框架通常将流行的完美实例级不变性假设视为理所当然，但我们仔细研究了背后的陷阱。特别是，我们认为现有的用于生成多个正面视图的增强管道自然会引入分布外（OOD）样本，从而破坏下游任务的学习。对输入产生不同的积极增强并不总是能够使下游任务受益。为了克服这一固有缺陷，我们引入了一种轻量级潜变量模型 UOTA，针对自监督学习的视图采样问题。 UOTA 自适应地搜索最重要的采样区域来生成视图，并为异常值稳健的自监督学习方法提供可行的选择。我们的方法直接推广到许多主流的自监督学习方法，无论损失的性质是否具有对比性。我们凭经验证明了 UOTA 相对于最先进的自我监督范式的优势，并具有明显的优势，这很好地证明了现有方法中嵌入的 OOD 样本问题的存在。特别是，我们从理论上证明了该提案的优点可以归结为保证估计方差和偏差减少。代码可用：https://github.com/ssl-codelab/uota。 本文针对自监督学习中因数据增强引入的分布外样本问题，提出轻量级潜在变量模型UOTA以改进视图采样策略。 Yu Wang,Jingyang Lin,Jingjing Zou,Yingwei Pan,Ting Yao,Tao Mei cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Carlo Marcati,Christoph Schwab
title: Exponential Convergence of Deep Operator Networks for Elliptic Partial Differential Equations
title_zh: 椭圆偏微分方程深度算子网络的指数收敛
abstract: We construct and analyze approximation rates of deep operator networks (ONets) between infinite-dimensional spaces that emulate with an exponential rate of convergence the coefficient-to-solution map of elliptic second-order partial differential equations. In particular, we consider problems set in $d$-dimensional periodic domains, $d=1, 2, \dots$, and with analytic right-hand sides and coefficients. Our analysis covers linear, elliptic second order divergence-form PDEs as, e.g., diffusion-reaction problems, parametric diffusion equations, and elliptic systems such as linear isotropic elastostatics in heterogeneous materials. We leverage the exponential convergence of spectral collocation methods for boundary value problems whose solutions are analytic. In the present periodic and analytic setting, this follows from classical elliptic regularity. Within the ONet branch and trunk construction of [Chen and Chen, 1993] and of [Lu et al., 2021], we show the existence of deep ONets which emulate the coefficient-to-solution map to a desired accuracy in the $H^1$ norm, uniformly over the coefficient set. We prove that the neural networks in the ONet have size $\mathcal{O}(\left|\log(\varepsilon)\right|^κ)$, where $\varepsilon>0$ is the approximation accuracy, for some $κ>0$ depending on the physical space dimension.
summary: We construct and analyze approximation rates of deep operator networks (ONets) between infinite-dimensional spaces that emulate with an exponential rate of convergence the coefficient-to-solution map of elliptic second-order partial differential equations. In particular, we consider problems set in $d$-dimensional periodic domains, $d=1, 2, \dots$, and with analytic right-hand sides and coefficients. Our analysis covers linear, elliptic second order divergence-form PDEs as, e.g., diffusion-reaction problems, parametric diffusion equations, and elliptic systems such as linear isotropic elastostatics in heterogeneous materials. We leverage the exponential convergence of spectral collocation methods for boundary value problems whose solutions are analytic. In the present periodic and analytic setting, this follows from classical elliptic regularity. Within the ONet branch and trunk construction of [Chen and Chen, 1993] and of [Lu et al., 2021], we show the existence of deep ONets which emulate the coefficient-to-solution map to a desired accuracy in the $H^1$ norm, uniformly over the coefficient set. We prove that the neural networks in the ONet have size $\mathcal{O}(\left|\log(\varepsilon)\right|^κ)$, where $\varepsilon>0$ is the approximation accuracy, for some $κ>0$ depending on the physical space dimension.
abstract_zh: 我们构建并分析了无限维空间之间的深度算子网络 (ONet) 的逼近率，该网络以指数收敛速度模拟椭圆二阶偏微分方程的系数到解图。特别是，我们考虑在 $d$ 维周期域 $d=1, 2, \dots$ 中设置的问题，并具有解析右侧和系数。我们的分析涵盖线性、椭圆二阶发散型偏微分方程，例如扩散反应问题、参数扩散方程和椭圆系统，例如异质材料中的线性各向同性弹性静力学。我们利用谱搭配方法的指数收敛来解决其解决方案是解析的边值问题。在当前的周期性和分析环境中，这遵循经典的椭圆正则性。在 [Chen and Chen, 1993] 和 [Lu et al., 2021] 的 ONet 分支和主干构建中，我们展示了深度 ONet 的存在，它可以在 $H^1$ 范数中模拟系数到解映射，达到所需的精度，在系数集上一致。我们证明 ONet 中的神经网络的大小为 $\mathcal{O}(\left|\log(\varepsilon)\right|^κ)$，其中 $\varepsilon>0$ 是近似精度，对于某些 $κ>0$ 取决于物理空间维度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度算子网络（ONets）在求解椭圆偏微分方程时的指数收敛性，证明其能够以指数速率逼近系数到解的映射。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法在处理高维或复杂系数的椭圆PDE时存在效率瓶颈，需探索基于深度学习的高效求解框架。
AI.method: 结合谱配置法与椭圆正则性理论，利用周期域和解析函数特性，基于Chen和Lu等人的ONet架构构建网络。
AI.result: 证明存在深度ONets可统一逼近系数集上的解，网络规模为$\\mathcal{O}(\\left|\\log(\\varepsilon)\ight|^\\kappa)$，且在$H^1$范数下达到指定精度。
AI.conclusion: 深度算子网络在解析条件下可实现椭圆PDE的指数收敛求解，为高维参数化问题提供了高效数值工具。

authors_text: Shuwei Shao,Zhongcai Pei,Weihai Chen,Wentao Zhu,Xingming Wu,Dianmin Sun,Baochang Zhang
title: Self-Supervised Monocular Depth and Ego-Motion Estimation in Endoscopy: Appearance Flow to the Rescue
title_zh: 内窥镜检查中的自监督单眼深度和自我运动估计：外观流的救援
abstract: Recently, self-supervised learning technology has been applied to calculate depth and ego-motion from monocular videos, achieving remarkable performance in autonomous driving scenarios. One widely adopted assumption of depth and ego-motion self-supervised learning is that the image brightness remains constant within nearby frames. Unfortunately, the endoscopic scene does not meet this assumption because there are severe brightness fluctuations induced by illumination variations, non-Lambertian reflections and interreflections during data collection, and these brightness fluctuations inevitably deteriorate the depth and ego-motion estimation accuracy. In this work, we introduce a novel concept referred to as appearance flow to address the brightness inconsistency problem. The appearance flow takes into consideration any variations in the brightness pattern and enables us to develop a generalized dynamic image constraint. Furthermore, we build a unified self-supervised framework to estimate monocular depth and ego-motion simultaneously in endoscopic scenes, which comprises a structure module, a motion module, an appearance module and a correspondence module, to accurately reconstruct the appearance and calibrate the image brightness. Extensive experiments are conducted on the SCARED dataset and EndoSLAM dataset, and the proposed unified framework exceeds other self-supervised approaches by a large margin. To validate our framework's generalization ability on different patients and cameras, we train our model on SCARED but test it on the SERV-CT and Hamlyn datasets without any fine-tuning, and the superior results reveal its strong generalization ability. Code will be available at: \url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/AF-SfMLearner}.
summary: Recently, self-supervised learning technology has been applied to calculate depth and ego-motion from monocular videos, achieving remarkable performance in autonomous driving scenarios. One widely adopted assumption of depth and ego-motion self-supervised learning is that the image brightness remains constant within nearby frames. Unfortunately, the endoscopic scene does not meet this assumption because there are severe brightness fluctuations induced by illumination variations, non-Lambertian reflections and interreflections during data collection, and these brightness fluctuations inevitably deteriorate the depth and ego-motion estimation accuracy. In this work, we introduce a novel concept referred to as appearance flow to address the brightness inconsistency problem. The appearance flow takes into consideration any variations in the brightness pattern and enables us to develop a generalized dynamic image constraint. Furthermore, we build a unified self-supervised framework to estimate monocular depth and ego-motion simultaneously in endoscopic scenes, which comprises a structure module, a motion module, an appearance module and a correspondence module, to accurately reconstruct the appearance and calibrate the image brightness. Extensive experiments are conducted on the SCARED dataset and EndoSLAM dataset, and the proposed unified framework exceeds other self-supervised approaches by a large margin. To validate our framework's generalization ability on different patients and cameras, we train our model on SCARED but test it on the SERV-CT and Hamlyn datasets without any fine-tuning, and the superior results reveal its strong generalization ability. Code will be available at: \url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/AF-SfMLearner}.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督学习技术已被应用于计算单目视频的深度和自我运动，在自动驾驶场景中取得了显着的性能。深度和自我运动自监督学习的一种广泛采用的假设是图像亮度在附近帧内保持恒定。不幸的是，内窥镜场景不满足这一假设，因为在数据收集过程中，光照变化、非朗伯反射和互反射会引起严重的亮度波动，这些亮度波动不可避免地会降低深度和自我运动估计的精度。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个称为外观流的新概念来解决亮度不一致问题。外观流程考虑了亮度模式的任何变化，并使我们能够开发通用的动态图像约束。此外，我们建立了一个统一的自监督框架，在内窥镜场景中同时估计单眼深度和自我运动，该框架包括结构模块、运动模块、外观模块和对应模块，以准确地重建外观并校准图像亮度。在 SCARED 数据集和 EndoSLAM 数据集上进行了大量的实验，所提出的统一框架大大超过了其他自监督方法。为了验证我们的框架在不同患者和摄像机上的泛化能力，我们在 SCARED 上训练我们的模型，但在 SERV-CT 和 Hamlyn 数据集上测试它，无需任何微调，优异的结果揭示了其强大的泛化能力。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/AF-SfMLearner}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于外观流的自监督单目深度和自运动估计方法，用于解决内窥镜场景中因亮度变化导致的估计精度下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督方法依赖于相邻帧亮度恒定的假设，但内窥镜场景存在光照变化、非朗伯反射等导致亮度波动的问题，严重影响深度和自运动估计的准确性。
AI.method: 引入外观流概念，通过动态图像约束建模亮度变化，并构建包含结构模块、运动模块、外观模块和对应模块的统一框架，实现深度与自运动的联合估计。
AI.result: 在SCARED和EndoSLAM数据集上显著优于其他自监督方法，且在未微调情况下跨患者和相机的SERV-CT和Hamlyn数据集上仍保持优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 外观流框架有效解决了内窥镜场景的亮度不一致性问题，为自监督单目估计提供了鲁棒且通用的解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 在SCARED和EndoSLAM数据集上显著优于其他自监督方法，且在未微调情况下跨患者和相机的SERV-CT和Hamlyn数据集上仍保持优越性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 外观流框架有效解决了内窥镜场景的亮度不一致性问题，为自监督单目估计提供了鲁棒且通用的解决方案。

search_text: Self-Supervised Monocular Depth and Ego-Motion Estimation in Endoscopy: Appearance Flow to the Rescue 内窥镜检查中的自监督单眼深度和自我运动估计：外观流的救援 Recently, self-supervised learning technology has been applied to calculate depth and ego-motion from monocular videos, achieving remarkable performance in autonomous driving scenarios. One widely adopted assumption of depth and ego-motion self-supervised learning is that the image brightness remains constant within nearby frames. Unfortunately, the endoscopic scene does not meet this assumption because there are severe brightness fluctuations induced by illumination variations, non-Lambertian reflections and interreflections during data collection, and these brightness fluctuations inevitably deteriorate the depth and ego-motion estimation accuracy. In this work, we introduce a novel concept referred to as appearance flow to address the brightness inconsistency problem. The appearance flow takes into consideration any variations in the brightness pattern and enables us to develop a generalized dynamic image constraint. Furthermore, we build a unified self-supervised framework to estimate monocular depth and ego-motion simultaneously in endoscopic scenes, which comprises a structure module, a motion module, an appearance module and a correspondence module, to accurately reconstruct the appearance and calibrate the image brightness. Extensive experiments are conducted on the SCARED dataset and EndoSLAM dataset, and the proposed unified framework exceeds other self-supervised approaches by a large margin. To validate our framework's generalization ability on different patients and cameras, we train our model on SCARED but test it on the SERV-CT and Hamlyn datasets without any fine-tuning, and the superior results reveal its strong generalization ability. Code will be available at: \url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/AF-SfMLearner}. 最近，自监督学习技术已被应用于计算单目视频的深度和自我运动，在自动驾驶场景中取得了显着的性能。深度和自我运动自监督学习的一种广泛采用的假设是图像亮度在附近帧内保持恒定。不幸的是，内窥镜场景不满足这一假设，因为在数据收集过程中，光照变化、非朗伯反射和互反射会引起严重的亮度波动，这些亮度波动不可避免地会降低深度和自我运动估计的精度。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个称为外观流的新概念来解决亮度不一致问题。外观流程考虑了亮度模式的任何变化，并使我们能够开发通用的动态图像约束。此外，我们建立了一个统一的自监督框架，在内窥镜场景中同时估计单眼深度和自我运动，该框架包括结构模块、运动模块、外观模块和对应模块，以准确地重建外观并校准图像亮度。在 SCARED 数据集和 EndoSLAM 数据集上进行了大量的实验，所提出的统一框架大大超过了其他自监督方法。为了验证我们的框架在不同患者和摄像机上的泛化能力，我们在 SCARED 上训练我们的模型，但在 SERV-CT 和 Hamlyn 数据集上测试它，无需任何微调，优异的结果揭示了其强大的泛化能力。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/AF-SfMLearner}。 本文提出了一种基于外观流的自监督单目深度和自运动估计方法，用于解决内窥镜场景中因亮度变化导致的估计精度下降问题。 Shuwei Shao,Zhongcai Pei,Weihai Chen,Wentao Zhu,Xingming Wu,Dianmin Sun,Baochang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Pengfei Pei,Xianfeng Zhao,Yun Cao,Jinchuan Li,Xuyuan Lai
title: Vision Transformer Based Video Hashing Retrieval for Tracing the Source of Fake Videos
title_zh: 基于 Vision Transformer 的视频哈希检索，用于追踪假视频的来源
abstract: In recent years, the spread of fake videos has brought great influence on individuals and even countries. It is important to provide robust and reliable results for fake videos. The results of conventional detection methods are not reliable and not robust for unseen videos. Another alternative and more effective way is to find the original video of the fake video. For example, fake videos from the Russia-Ukraine war and the Hong Kong law revision storm are refuted by finding the original video. We use an improved retrieval method to find the original video, named ViTHash. Specifically, tracing the source of fake videos requires finding the unique one, which is difficult when there are only small differences in the original videos. To solve the above problems, we designed a novel loss Hash Triplet Loss. In addition, we designed a tool called Localizator to compare the difference between the original traced video and the fake video. We have done extensive experiments on FaceForensics++, Celeb-DF and DeepFakeDetection, and we also have done additional experiments on our built three datasets: DAVIS2016-TL (video inpainting), VSTL (video splicing) and DFTL (similar videos). Experiments have shown that our performance is better than state-of-the-art methods, especially in cross-dataset mode. Experiments also demonstrated that ViTHash is effective in various forgery detection: video inpainting, video splicing and deepfakes. Our code and datasets have been released on GitHub: \url{https://github.com/lajlksdf/vtl}.
summary: In recent years, the spread of fake videos has brought great influence on individuals and even countries. It is important to provide robust and reliable results for fake videos. The results of conventional detection methods are not reliable and not robust for unseen videos. Another alternative and more effective way is to find the original video of the fake video. For example, fake videos from the Russia-Ukraine war and the Hong Kong law revision storm are refuted by finding the original video. We use an improved retrieval method to find the original video, named ViTHash. Specifically, tracing the source of fake videos requires finding the unique one, which is difficult when there are only small differences in the original videos. To solve the above problems, we designed a novel loss Hash Triplet Loss. In addition, we designed a tool called Localizator to compare the difference between the original traced video and the fake video. We have done extensive experiments on FaceForensics++, Celeb-DF and DeepFakeDetection, and we also have done additional experiments on our built three datasets: DAVIS2016-TL (video inpainting), VSTL (video splicing) and DFTL (similar videos). Experiments have shown that our performance is better than state-of-the-art methods, especially in cross-dataset mode. Experiments also demonstrated that ViTHash is effective in various forgery detection: video inpainting, video splicing and deepfakes. Our code and datasets have been released on GitHub: \url{https://github.com/lajlksdf/vtl}.
abstract_zh: 近年来，假视频的传播给个人乃至国家带来了巨大影响。为虚假视频提供稳健且可靠的结果非常重要。对于未见过的视频，传统检测方法的结果不可靠且不稳健。另一种替代且更有效的方法是找到假视频的原始视频。比如俄罗斯乌克兰战争、香港修法风波等假视频，通过查找原始视频来驳斥。我们使用改进的检索方法来查找原始视频，命名为ViTHash。具体来说，追踪假视频的来源需要找到唯一的假视频，当原始视频只有微小差异时，这一点很困难。为了解决上述问题，我们设计了一种新颖的损失Hash Triplet Loss。此外，我们还设计了一个名为 Localizator 的工具来比较原始追踪视频和假视频之间的差异。我们在 FaceForensics++、Celeb-DF 和 DeepFakeDetection 上做了广泛的实验，并且还在我们构建的三个数据集上做了额外的实验：DAVIS2016-TL（视频修复）、VSTL（视频拼接）和 DFTL（相似视频）。实验表明，我们的性能优于最先进的方法，特别是在跨数据集模式下。实验还证明，ViTHash 在各种伪造检测中都很有效：视频修复、视频拼接和深度伪造。我们的代码和数据集已发布在 GitHub 上：\url{https://github.com/lajlksdf/vtl}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉Transformer的视频哈希检索方法ViTHash，用于追踪虚假视频的原始来源。
AI.motivation: 传统检测方法对未见过的虚假视频效果不佳，通过检索原始视频可更有效反驳虚假信息，例如俄乌战争和香港修例风波中的案例。
AI.method: 设计了改进的哈希三元组损失函数（Hash Triplet Loss）和工具Localizator，用于学习视频哈希特征并比较原始视频与虚假视频的差异。
AI.result: 在FaceForensics++、Celeb-DF等数据集及自建数据集上实验表明，ViTHash在跨数据集模式下优于现有方法，且适用于视频修复、拼接和深度伪造等多种伪造检测。
AI.conclusion: ViTHash通过哈希检索有效追踪虚假视频来源，方法在多种伪造场景中表现优异，代码和数据集已开源。

authors_text: Han Ma,Chenming Li,Jianbang Liu,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. Meng
title: Enhance Connectivity of Promising Regions for Sampling-based Path Planning
title_zh: 增强基于采样的路径规划的有前景区域的连通性
comment: Accepted in Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2022
comments: Accepted in Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2022
abstract: Sampling-based path planning algorithms usually implement uniform sampling methods to search the state space. However, uniform sampling may lead to unnecessary exploration in many scenarios, such as the environment with a few dead ends. Our previous work proposes to use the promising region to guide the sampling process to address the issue. However, the predicted promising regions are often disconnected, which means they cannot connect the start and goal state, resulting in a lack of probabilistic completeness. This work focuses on enhancing the connectivity of predicted promising regions. Our proposed method regresses the connectivity probability of the edges in the x and y directions. In addition, it calculates the weight of the promising edges in loss to guide the neural network to pay more attention to the connectivity of the promising regions. We conduct a series of simulation experiments, and the results show that the connectivity of promising regions improves significantly. Furthermore, we analyze the effect of connectivity on sampling-based path planning algorithms and conclude that connectivity plays an essential role in maintaining algorithm performance.
summary: Sampling-based path planning algorithms usually implement uniform sampling methods to search the state space. However, uniform sampling may lead to unnecessary exploration in many scenarios, such as the environment with a few dead ends. Our previous work proposes to use the promising region to guide the sampling process to address the issue. However, the predicted promising regions are often disconnected, which means they cannot connect the start and goal state, resulting in a lack of probabilistic completeness. This work focuses on enhancing the connectivity of predicted promising regions. Our proposed method regresses the connectivity probability of the edges in the x and y directions. In addition, it calculates the weight of the promising edges in loss to guide the neural network to pay more attention to the connectivity of the promising regions. We conduct a series of simulation experiments, and the results show that the connectivity of promising regions improves significantly. Furthermore, we analyze the effect of connectivity on sampling-based path planning algorithms and conclude that connectivity plays an essential role in maintaining algorithm performance.
abstract_zh: 基于采样的路径规划算法通常采用统一采样方法来搜索状态空间。然而，在很多场景下，统一采样可能会导致不必要的探索，比如有一些死胡同的环境。我们之前的工作建议使用有希望的区域来指导采样过程来解决该问题。然而，预测的有希望的区域通常是断开的，这意味着它们无法连接起始状态和目标状态，导致缺乏概率完整性。这项工作的重点是增强预测有前途区域的连通性。我们提出的方法回归 x 和 y 方向上边缘的连通概率。此外，它还计算损失中有希望的边的权重，以引导神经网络更多地关注有希望的区域的连通性。我们进行了一系列的模拟实验，结果表明有前景区域的连通性显着改善。此外，我们分析了连通性对基于采样的路径规划算法的影响，并得出结论，连通性在维持算法性能方面起着至关重要的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过增强预测的有希望区域的连通性，以提升基于采样的路径规划算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 基于采样的路径规划算法通常采用均匀采样方法，但在某些场景下会导致不必要的探索，而之前的工作虽然引入了有希望区域来指导采样过程，但这些区域通常是不连通的，从而影响算法的完备性。
AI.method: 本文提出的方法通过回归x和y方向的边连通概率，并在损失函数中计算有希望边的权重，引导神经网络更加关注有希望区域的连通性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，预测的有希望区域的连通性得到了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 连通性在保持基于采样的路径规划算法性能方面起着至关重要的作用。

ai_content_json.result: 实验结果表明，预测的有希望区域的连通性得到了显著提升。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 连通性在保持基于采样的路径规划算法性能方面起着至关重要的作用。

tldr: 本文旨在通过增强预测的有希望区域的连通性，以提升基于采样的路径规划算法的性能。
motivation: 基于采样的路径规划算法通常采用均匀采样方法，但在某些场景下会导致不必要的探索，而之前的工作虽然引入了有希望区域来指导采样过程，但这些区域通常是不连通的，从而影响算法的完备性。
method: 本文提出的方法通过回归x和y方向的边连通概率，并在损失函数中计算有希望边的权重，引导神经网络更加关注有希望区域的连通性。
result: 实验结果表明，预测的有希望区域的连通性得到了显著提升。
conclusion: 连通性在保持基于采样的路径规划算法性能方面起着至关重要的作用。
search_text: Enhance Connectivity of Promising Regions for Sampling-based Path Planning 增强基于采样的路径规划的有前景区域的连通性 Sampling-based path planning algorithms usually implement uniform sampling methods to search the state space. However, uniform sampling may lead to unnecessary exploration in many scenarios, such as the environment with a few dead ends. Our previous work proposes to use the promising region to guide the sampling process to address the issue. However, the predicted promising regions are often disconnected, which means they cannot connect the start and goal state, resulting in a lack of probabilistic completeness. This work focuses on enhancing the connectivity of predicted promising regions. Our proposed method regresses the connectivity probability of the edges in the x and y directions. In addition, it calculates the weight of the promising edges in loss to guide the neural network to pay more attention to the connectivity of the promising regions. We conduct a series of simulation experiments, and the results show that the connectivity of promising regions improves significantly. Furthermore, we analyze the effect of connectivity on sampling-based path planning algorithms and conclude that connectivity plays an essential role in maintaining algorithm performance. 基于采样的路径规划算法通常采用统一采样方法来搜索状态空间。然而，在很多场景下，统一采样可能会导致不必要的探索，比如有一些死胡同的环境。我们之前的工作建议使用有希望的区域来指导采样过程来解决该问题。然而，预测的有希望的区域通常是断开的，这意味着它们无法连接起始状态和目标状态，导致缺乏概率完整性。这项工作的重点是增强预测有前途区域的连通性。我们提出的方法回归 x 和 y 方向上边缘的连通概率。此外，它还计算损失中有希望的边的权重，以引导神经网络更多地关注有希望的区域的连通性。我们进行了一系列的模拟实验，结果表明有前景区域的连通性显着改善。此外，我们分析了连通性对基于采样的路径规划算法的影响，并得出结论，连通性在维持算法性能方面起着至关重要的作用。 本文旨在通过增强预测的有希望区域的连通性，以提升基于采样的路径规划算法的性能。 Han Ma,Chenming Li,Jianbang Liu,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. Meng cs.RO

authors_text: Shubao Zhang
title: Towards Controllable Agent in MOBA Games with Generative Modeling
title_zh: 利用生成建模实现 MOBA 游戏中的可控代理
comment: Human-Compatible AI; Human-AI Cooperation; AI control; AI Alignment
comments: Human-Compatible AI; Human-AI Cooperation; AI control; AI Alignment
abstract: We propose novel methods to develop action controllable agent that behaves like a human and has the ability to align with human players in Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) games. By modeling the control problem as an action generation process, we devise a deep latent alignment neural network model for training agent, and a corresponding sampling algorithm for controlling an agent's action. Particularly, we propose deterministic and stochastic attention implementations of the core latent alignment model. Both simulated and online experiments in the game Honor of Kings demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed methods.
summary: We propose novel methods to develop action controllable agent that behaves like a human and has the ability to align with human players in Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) games. By modeling the control problem as an action generation process, we devise a deep latent alignment neural network model for training agent, and a corresponding sampling algorithm for controlling an agent's action. Particularly, we propose deterministic and stochastic attention implementations of the core latent alignment model. Both simulated and online experiments in the game Honor of Kings demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了新的方法来开发动作可控代理，其行为类似于人类，并且能够在多人在线竞技场（MOBA）游戏中与人类玩家保持一致。通过将控制问题建模为动作生成过程，我们设计了用于训练智能体的深度潜在对齐神经网络模型，以及用于控制智能体动作的相应采样算法。特别是，我们提出了核心潜在对齐模型的确定性和随机注意力实现。 《王者荣耀》游戏中的模拟和在线实验都证明了所提方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成模型方法，开发可在MOBA游戏中实现人类行为模仿并与玩家对齐的可控智能体。
AI.motivation: 现有MOBA游戏智能体缺乏人类般的动作控制能力与玩家协作适应性，需更灵活的控制方法实现拟人化行为。
AI.method: 将控制问题建模为动作生成过程，设计深度潜在对齐神经网络模型及采样算法，包含确定性和随机性注意力机制实现。
AI.result: 在《王者荣耀》的模拟与在线实验中验证了方法有效性，智能体表现出类人行为及与玩家的对齐能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的生成模型框架成功实现了MOBA游戏中可控智能体的开发，为游戏AI的拟人化交互提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wenyu Liu,Gaofeng Ren,Runsheng Yu,Shi Guo,Jianke Zhu,Lei Zhang
title: Image-Adaptive YOLO for Object Detection in Adverse Weather Conditions
title_zh: 用于恶劣天气条件下目标检测的图像自适应 YOLO
abstract: Though deep learning-based object detection methods have achieved promising results on the conventional datasets, it is still challenging to locate objects from the low-quality images captured in adverse weather conditions. The existing methods either have difficulties in balancing the tasks of image enhancement and object detection, or often ignore the latent information beneficial for detection. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel Image-Adaptive YOLO (IA-YOLO) framework, where each image can be adaptively enhanced for better detection performance. Specifically, a differentiable image processing (DIP) module is presented to take into account the adverse weather conditions for YOLO detector, whose parameters are predicted by a small convolutional neural net-work (CNN-PP). We learn CNN-PP and YOLOv3 jointly in an end-to-end fashion, which ensures that CNN-PP can learn an appropriate DIP to enhance the image for detection in a weakly supervised manner. Our proposed IA-YOLO approach can adaptively process images in both normal and adverse weather conditions. The experimental results are very encouraging, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed IA-YOLO method in both foggy and low-light scenarios.
summary: Though deep learning-based object detection methods have achieved promising results on the conventional datasets, it is still challenging to locate objects from the low-quality images captured in adverse weather conditions. The existing methods either have difficulties in balancing the tasks of image enhancement and object detection, or often ignore the latent information beneficial for detection. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel Image-Adaptive YOLO (IA-YOLO) framework, where each image can be adaptively enhanced for better detection performance. Specifically, a differentiable image processing (DIP) module is presented to take into account the adverse weather conditions for YOLO detector, whose parameters are predicted by a small convolutional neural net-work (CNN-PP). We learn CNN-PP and YOLOv3 jointly in an end-to-end fashion, which ensures that CNN-PP can learn an appropriate DIP to enhance the image for detection in a weakly supervised manner. Our proposed IA-YOLO approach can adaptively process images in both normal and adverse weather conditions. The experimental results are very encouraging, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed IA-YOLO method in both foggy and low-light scenarios.
abstract_zh: 尽管基于深度学习的目标检测方法在传统数据集上取得了可喜的结果，但从恶劣天气条件下捕获的低质量图像中定位目标仍然具有挑战性。现有的方法要么难以平衡图像增强和目标检测的任务，要么经常忽略有利于检测的潜在信息。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的图像自适应 YOLO (IA-YOLO) 框架，其中每个图像都可以自适应增强以获得更好的检测性能。具体来说，提出了一个可微图像处理（DIP）模块来考虑YOLO检测器的恶劣天气条件，其参数由小型卷积神经网络（CNN-PP）预测。我们以端到端的方式联合学习 CNN-PP 和 YOLOv3，这确保了 CNN-PP 可以学习适当的 DIP 来增强图像，以弱监督的方式进行检测。我们提出的 IA-YOLO 方法可以在正常和恶劣天气条件下自适应地处理图像。实验结果非常令人鼓舞，证明了我们提出的 IA-YOLO 方法在雾天和弱光场景下的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应图像处理的YOLO框架（IA-YOLO），用于提升恶劣天气条件下目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法在恶劣天气下因图像质量差而效果不佳，且难以平衡图像增强与检测任务，或忽略潜在有用信息。
AI.method: 设计可微分图像处理模块（DIP）与小型CNN（CNN-PP）联合训练YOLOv3，通过端到端弱监督学习自适应增强图像。
AI.result: 实验表明IA-YOLO在雾天和低光场景中显著提升检测效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: IA-YOLO通过自适应图像增强与检测联合优化，有效解决了恶劣天气下的目标检测难题。

ai_content.conclusion: IA-YOLO通过自适应图像增强与检测联合优化，有效解决了恶劣天气下的目标检测难题。

authors_text: Diptesh Kanojia,Prashant Sharma,Sayali Ghodekar,Pushpak Bhattacharyya,Gholamreza Haffari,Malhar Kulkarni
title: Cognition-aware Cognate Detection
title_zh: 认知感知同源检测
abstract: Automatic detection of cognates helps downstream NLP tasks of Machine Translation, Cross-lingual Information Retrieval, Computational Phylogenetics and Cross-lingual Named Entity Recognition. Previous approaches for the task of cognate detection use orthographic, phonetic and semantic similarity based features sets. In this paper, we propose a novel method for enriching the feature sets, with cognitive features extracted from human readers' gaze behaviour. We collect gaze behaviour data for a small sample of cognates and show that extracted cognitive features help the task of cognate detection. However, gaze data collection and annotation is a costly task. We use the collected gaze behaviour data to predict cognitive features for a larger sample and show that predicted cognitive features, also, significantly improve the task performance. We report improvements of 10% with the collected gaze features, and 12% using the predicted gaze features, over the previously proposed approaches. Furthermore, we release the collected gaze behaviour data along with our code and cross-lingual models.
summary: Automatic detection of cognates helps downstream NLP tasks of Machine Translation, Cross-lingual Information Retrieval, Computational Phylogenetics and Cross-lingual Named Entity Recognition. Previous approaches for the task of cognate detection use orthographic, phonetic and semantic similarity based features sets. In this paper, we propose a novel method for enriching the feature sets, with cognitive features extracted from human readers' gaze behaviour. We collect gaze behaviour data for a small sample of cognates and show that extracted cognitive features help the task of cognate detection. However, gaze data collection and annotation is a costly task. We use the collected gaze behaviour data to predict cognitive features for a larger sample and show that predicted cognitive features, also, significantly improve the task performance. We report improvements of 10% with the collected gaze features, and 12% using the predicted gaze features, over the previously proposed approaches. Furthermore, we release the collected gaze behaviour data along with our code and cross-lingual models.
abstract_zh: 同源词的自动检测有助于机器翻译、跨语言信息检索、计算系统发育学和跨语言命名实体识别等下游 NLP 任务。以前的同源检测任务方法使用基于字法、语音和语义相似性的特征集。在本文中，我们提出了一种丰富特征集的新方法，从人类读者的注视行为中提取认知特征。我们收集了一小部分同源样本的注视行为数据，并表明提取的认知特征有助于同源检测的任务。然而，注视数据收集和注释是一项成本高昂的任务。我们使用收集的注视行为数据来预测更大样本的认知特征，并表明预测的认知特征也可以显着提高任务绩效。与之前提出的方法相比，我们报告使用收集的注视特征提高了 10%，使用预测的注视特征提高了 12%。此外，我们还发布了收集到的注视行为数据以及我们的代码和跨语言模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于认知特征的同源词检测方法，利用眼动数据提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有同源词检测方法依赖正字法、语音和语义特征，但缺乏人类认知因素。眼动数据能反映认知过程，可能提升检测准确性。
AI.method: 收集人类读者眼动数据提取认知特征，并利用该数据预测更大样本的认知特征，结合传统特征进行检测。
AI.result: 使用收集眼动特征提升10%，预测特征提升12%，并公开数据与代码。
AI.conclusion: 认知特征有效提升检测性能，预测方法可行，为跨语言研究提供新资源。

search_text: Cognition-aware Cognate Detection 认知感知同源检测 Automatic detection of cognates helps downstream NLP tasks of Machine Translation, Cross-lingual Information Retrieval, Computational Phylogenetics and Cross-lingual Named Entity Recognition. Previous approaches for the task of cognate detection use orthographic, phonetic and semantic similarity based features sets. In this paper, we propose a novel method for enriching the feature sets, with cognitive features extracted from human readers' gaze behaviour. We collect gaze behaviour data for a small sample of cognates and show that extracted cognitive features help the task of cognate detection. However, gaze data collection and annotation is a costly task. We use the collected gaze behaviour data to predict cognitive features for a larger sample and show that predicted cognitive features, also, significantly improve the task performance. We report improvements of 10% with the collected gaze features, and 12% using the predicted gaze features, over the previously proposed approaches. Furthermore, we release the collected gaze behaviour data along with our code and cross-lingual models. 同源词的自动检测有助于机器翻译、跨语言信息检索、计算系统发育学和跨语言命名实体识别等下游 NLP 任务。以前的同源检测任务方法使用基于字法、语音和语义相似性的特征集。在本文中，我们提出了一种丰富特征集的新方法，从人类读者的注视行为中提取认知特征。我们收集了一小部分同源样本的注视行为数据，并表明提取的认知特征有助于同源检测的任务。然而，注视数据收集和注释是一项成本高昂的任务。我们使用收集的注视行为数据来预测更大样本的认知特征，并表明预测的认知特征也可以显着提高任务绩效。与之前提出的方法相比，我们报告使用收集的注视特征提高了 10%，使用预测的注视特征提高了 12%。此外，我们还发布了收集到的注视行为数据以及我们的代码和跨语言模型。 提出一种基于认知特征的同源词检测方法，利用眼动数据提升检测效果。 Diptesh Kanojia,Prashant Sharma,Sayali Ghodekar,Pushpak Bhattacharyya,Gholamreza Haffari,Malhar Kulkarni cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Anas Skalli,Joshua Robertson,Dafydd Owen-Newns,Matej Hejda,Xavier Porte,Stephan Reitzenstein,Antonio Hurtado,D. Brunner
title: Photonic neuromorphic computing using vertical cavity semiconductor lasers
title_zh: 使用垂直腔半导体激光器的光子神经形态计算
abstract: Photonic realizations of neural network computing hardware are a promising approach to enable future scalability of neuromorphic computing. In this review we provide an overview on vertical-cavity surface-emitting lasers (VCSELs) and how these high-performance electro-optical components either implement or are combined with additional photonic hardware to demonstrate points (i-iii). In the neurmorphic photonics' context, VCSELs are of exceptional interest as they are compatible with CMOS fabrication, readily achieve 30\% wall-plug efficiency and >30~GHz modulation bandwidth and hence are highly energy efficient and ultra-fast. Crucially, they react highly nonlinear to optical injection as well as to electrical modulation, making them highly suitable as all-optical as well as electro-optical photonic neurons. Their optical cavities are wavelength-limited, and standard semiconductor growth and lithography enables non-classical cavity configurations and geometries. This enables excitable VCSELs (i.e. spiking VCSELs) to finely control their temporal and spatial coherence, to unlock Terahertz bandwidths through spin-flip effects, and even to leverage cavity quantum electrodynamics to further boost their efficiency. Finally, as VCSEL arrays they are compatible with standard 2D photonic integration, but their emission vertical to the substrate makes them ideally suited for scalable integrated networks leveraging 3D photonic waveguides. Here, we discuss the implementation of spatially as well as temporally multiplexed VCSEL neural networks and reservoirs, computation on the basis of excitable VCSELs as photonic spiking neurons, as well as concepts and advances in the fabrication of VCSELs and microlasers.
summary: Photonic realizations of neural network computing hardware are a promising approach to enable future scalability of neuromorphic computing. In this review we provide an overview on vertical-cavity surface-emitting lasers (VCSELs) and how these high-performance electro-optical components either implement or are combined with additional photonic hardware to demonstrate points (i-iii). In the neurmorphic photonics' context, VCSELs are of exceptional interest as they are compatible with CMOS fabrication, readily achieve 30\% wall-plug efficiency and >30~GHz modulation bandwidth and hence are highly energy efficient and ultra-fast. Crucially, they react highly nonlinear to optical injection as well as to electrical modulation, making them highly suitable as all-optical as well as electro-optical photonic neurons. Their optical cavities are wavelength-limited, and standard semiconductor growth and lithography enables non-classical cavity configurations and geometries. This enables excitable VCSELs (i.e. spiking VCSELs) to finely control their temporal and spatial coherence, to unlock Terahertz bandwidths through spin-flip effects, and even to leverage cavity quantum electrodynamics to further boost their efficiency. Finally, as VCSEL arrays they are compatible with standard 2D photonic integration, but their emission vertical to the substrate makes them ideally suited for scalable integrated networks leveraging 3D photonic waveguides. Here, we discuss the implementation of spatially as well as temporally multiplexed VCSEL neural networks and reservoirs, computation on the basis of excitable VCSELs as photonic spiking neurons, as well as concepts and advances in the fabrication of VCSELs and microlasers.
abstract_zh: 神经网络计算硬件的光子实现是实现神经形态计算未来可扩展性的一种有前景的方法。在这篇综述中，我们概述了垂直腔表面发射激光器 (VCSEL) 以及这些高性能电光组件如何实现或与其他光子硬件相结合以演示要点 (i-iii)。在神经形态光子学背景下，VCSEL 备受关注，因为它们与 CMOS 制造兼容，可轻松实现 30% 的电光转换效率和 >30GHz 的调制带宽，因此具有高能效和超快的性能。至关重要的是，它们对光注入和电调制具有高度非线性反应，这使得它们非常适合作为全光和电光光子神经元。它们的光学腔受到波长限制，标准半导体生长和光刻可实现非经典腔配置和几何形状。这使得可激励 VCSEL（即尖峰 VCSEL）能够精细控制其时间和空间相干性，通过自旋翻转效应解锁太赫兹带宽，甚至利用腔量子电动力学进一步提高其效率。最后，作为 VCSEL 阵列，它们与标准 2D 光子集成兼容，但其垂直于基板的发射使其非常适合利用 3D 光子波导的可扩展集成网络。在这里，我们讨论了空间和时间复用 VCSEL 神经网络和存储库的实现、基于作为光子尖峰神经元的可兴奋 VCSEL 的计算，以及 VCSEL 和微型激光器制造的概念和进展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了垂直腔面发射激光器（VCSELs）在光子神经形态计算中的应用，探讨其作为光子神经元的潜力及集成方案。
AI.motivation: 传统电子神经形态计算面临能效与速度瓶颈，而VCSELs兼具高能效、超高速、强非线性响应等特性，适合构建下一代光子神经计算硬件。
AI.method: 通过分析VCSELs的物理特性（如光学腔结构、非线性响应）、制造工艺（CMOS兼容性、3D集成）及多维复用技术，结合实验与理论探讨其在神经网络中的实现方式。
AI.result: 展示了VCSELs可实现太赫兹带宽、可调控时空相干性、3D光子网络集成，并验证了其作为脉冲神经元及储备池计算单元的可行性。
AI.conclusion: VCSELs凭借独特优势成为光子神经计算的核心组件，未来需进一步突破制造精度与3D集成技术以实现大规模应用。

authors_text: Amit Bracha,Noam Rotstein,David Bensaïd,Ron Slossberg,Ron Kimmel
title: Depth Refinement for Improved Stereo Reconstruction
title_zh: 深度细化改进立体重建
abstract: Depth estimation is a cornerstone of a vast number of applications requiring 3D assessment of the environment, such as robotics, augmented reality, and autonomous driving to name a few. One prominent technique for depth estimation is stereo matching which has several advantages: it is considered more accessible than other depth-sensing technologies, can produce dense depth estimates in real-time, and has benefited greatly from the advances of deep learning in recent years. However, current techniques for depth estimation from stereoscopic images still suffer from a built-in drawback. To reconstruct depth, a stereo matching algorithm first estimates the disparity map between the left and right images before applying a geometric triangulation. A simple analysis reveals that the depth error is quadratically proportional to the object's distance. Therefore, constant disparity errors are translated to large depth errors for objects far from the camera. To mitigate this quadratic relation, we propose a simple but effective method that uses a refinement network for depth estimation. We show analytical and empirical results suggesting that the proposed learning procedure reduces this quadratic relation. We evaluate the proposed refinement procedure on well-known benchmarks and datasets, like Sceneflow and KITTI datasets, and demonstrate significant improvements in the depth accuracy metric.
summary: Depth estimation is a cornerstone of a vast number of applications requiring 3D assessment of the environment, such as robotics, augmented reality, and autonomous driving to name a few. One prominent technique for depth estimation is stereo matching which has several advantages: it is considered more accessible than other depth-sensing technologies, can produce dense depth estimates in real-time, and has benefited greatly from the advances of deep learning in recent years. However, current techniques for depth estimation from stereoscopic images still suffer from a built-in drawback. To reconstruct depth, a stereo matching algorithm first estimates the disparity map between the left and right images before applying a geometric triangulation. A simple analysis reveals that the depth error is quadratically proportional to the object's distance. Therefore, constant disparity errors are translated to large depth errors for objects far from the camera. To mitigate this quadratic relation, we propose a simple but effective method that uses a refinement network for depth estimation. We show analytical and empirical results suggesting that the proposed learning procedure reduces this quadratic relation. We evaluate the proposed refinement procedure on well-known benchmarks and datasets, like Sceneflow and KITTI datasets, and demonstrate significant improvements in the depth accuracy metric.
abstract_zh: 深度估计是需要对环境进行 3D 评估的大量应用的基石，例如机器人、增强现实和自动驾驶等。深度估计的一项突出技术是立体匹配，它有几个优点：它被认为比其他深度传感技术更容易使用，可以实时产生密集的深度估计，并且从近年来深度学习的进步中受益匪浅。然而，当前从立体图像进行深度估计的技术仍然存在固有的缺陷。为了重建深度，立体匹配算法首先估计左右图像之间的视差图，然后再应用几何三角测量。简单分析表明，深度误差与物体距离成二次方比例。因此，对于远离相机的物体，恒定的视差误差会转化为较大的深度误差。为了缓解这种二次关系，我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法，使用细化网络进行深度估计。我们展示的分析和实证结果表明，所提出的学习过程减少了这种二次关系。我们在众所周知的基准和数据集（例如 Sceneflow 和 KITTI 数据集）上评估了所提出的细化过程，并展示了深度精度指标的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度优化方法，通过改进立体视觉重建中的深度估计，减少远距离物体的深度误差。
AI.motivation: 现有立体匹配算法因深度误差与物体距离呈二次方关系，导致远距离物体深度估计不准确，亟需改进方法降低误差。
AI.method: 设计一个精炼网络（refinement network），通过学习调整视差图，缓解深度误差的二次方增长关系。
AI.result: 在Sceneflow和KITTI等数据集上验证，深度精度指标显著提升，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了深度误差的二次方关系，提升了立体重建的深度估计质量。

tldr: 本文提出一种深度优化方法，通过改进立体视觉重建中的深度估计，减少远距离物体的深度误差。
motivation: 现有立体匹配算法因深度误差与物体距离呈二次方关系，导致远距离物体深度估计不准确，亟需改进方法降低误差。
method: 设计一个精炼网络（refinement network），通过学习调整视差图，缓解深度误差的二次方增长关系。
result: 在Sceneflow和KITTI等数据集上验证，深度精度指标显著提升，证明方法有效性。
conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了深度误差的二次方关系，提升了立体重建的深度估计质量。
search_text: Depth Refinement for Improved Stereo Reconstruction 深度细化改进立体重建 Depth estimation is a cornerstone of a vast number of applications requiring 3D assessment of the environment, such as robotics, augmented reality, and autonomous driving to name a few. One prominent technique for depth estimation is stereo matching which has several advantages: it is considered more accessible than other depth-sensing technologies, can produce dense depth estimates in real-time, and has benefited greatly from the advances of deep learning in recent years. However, current techniques for depth estimation from stereoscopic images still suffer from a built-in drawback. To reconstruct depth, a stereo matching algorithm first estimates the disparity map between the left and right images before applying a geometric triangulation. A simple analysis reveals that the depth error is quadratically proportional to the object's distance. Therefore, constant disparity errors are translated to large depth errors for objects far from the camera. To mitigate this quadratic relation, we propose a simple but effective method that uses a refinement network for depth estimation. We show analytical and empirical results suggesting that the proposed learning procedure reduces this quadratic relation. We evaluate the proposed refinement procedure on well-known benchmarks and datasets, like Sceneflow and KITTI datasets, and demonstrate significant improvements in the depth accuracy metric. 深度估计是需要对环境进行 3D 评估的大量应用的基石，例如机器人、增强现实和自动驾驶等。深度估计的一项突出技术是立体匹配，它有几个优点：它被认为比其他深度传感技术更容易使用，可以实时产生密集的深度估计，并且从近年来深度学习的进步中受益匪浅。然而，当前从立体图像进行深度估计的技术仍然存在固有的缺陷。为了重建深度，立体匹配算法首先估计左右图像之间的视差图，然后再应用几何三角测量。简单分析表明，深度误差与物体距离成二次方比例。因此，对于远离相机的物体，恒定的视差误差会转化为较大的深度误差。为了缓解这种二次关系，我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法，使用细化网络进行深度估计。我们展示的分析和实证结果表明，所提出的学习过程减少了这种二次关系。我们在众所周知的基准和数据集（例如 Sceneflow 和 KITTI 数据集）上评估了所提出的细化过程，并展示了深度精度指标的显着改进。 本文提出一种深度优化方法，通过改进立体视觉重建中的深度估计，减少远距离物体的深度误差。 Amit Bracha,Noam Rotstein,David Bensaïd,Ron Slossberg,Ron Kimmel cs.CV

authors_text: Justin Hellermann,Stefan Lessmann
title: Leveraging Image-based Generative Adversarial Networks for Time Series Generation
title_zh: 利用基于图像的生成对抗网络进行时间序列生成
abstract: Generative models for images have gained significant attention in computer vision and natural language processing due to their ability to generate realistic samples from complex data distributions. To leverage the advances of image-based generative models for the time series domain, we propose a two-dimensional image representation for time series, the Extended Intertemporal Return Plot (XIRP). Our approach captures the intertemporal time series dynamics in a scale-invariant and invertible way, reducing training time and improving sample quality. We benchmark synthetic XIRPs obtained by an off-the-shelf Wasserstein GAN with gradient penalty (WGAN-GP) to other image representations and models regarding similarity and predictive ability metrics. Our novel, validated image representation for time series consistently and significantly outperforms a state-of-the-art RNN-based generative model regarding predictive ability. Further, we introduce an improved stochastic inversion to substantially improve simulation quality regardless of the representation and provide the prospect of transfer potentials in other domains.
summary: Generative models for images have gained significant attention in computer vision and natural language processing due to their ability to generate realistic samples from complex data distributions. To leverage the advances of image-based generative models for the time series domain, we propose a two-dimensional image representation for time series, the Extended Intertemporal Return Plot (XIRP). Our approach captures the intertemporal time series dynamics in a scale-invariant and invertible way, reducing training time and improving sample quality. We benchmark synthetic XIRPs obtained by an off-the-shelf Wasserstein GAN with gradient penalty (WGAN-GP) to other image representations and models regarding similarity and predictive ability metrics. Our novel, validated image representation for time series consistently and significantly outperforms a state-of-the-art RNN-based generative model regarding predictive ability. Further, we introduce an improved stochastic inversion to substantially improve simulation quality regardless of the representation and provide the prospect of transfer potentials in other domains.
abstract_zh: 图像生成模型由于能够从复杂的数据分布生成真实的样本，因此在计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域获得了极大的关注。为了利用时间序列领域基于图像的生成模型的进步，我们提出了时间序列的二维图像表示，即扩展跨期回报图（XIRP）。我们的方法以尺度不变和可逆的方式捕获跨期时间序列动态，从而减少训练时间并提高样本质量。我们将由现成的具有梯度惩罚的 Wasserstein GAN (WGAN-GP) 获得的合成 XIRP 与其他图像表示和模型在相似性和预测能力指标方面进行基准测试。我们新颖且经过验证的时间序列图像表示在预测能力方面始终显着优于最先进的基于 RNN 的生成模型。此外，我们引入了改进的随机反演，以显着提高模拟质量，无论表示如何，并提供其他领域转移潜力的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将图像生成对抗网络（GAN）应用于时间序列生成，通过构建扩展跨时期收益图（XIRP）的二维图像表示方法，提升时间序列的生成效果与预测能力。
AI.motivation: 图像生成模型在生成真实样本方面表现优异，但时间序列生成领域仍依赖传统模型（如RNN）。为借鉴图像生成技术的优势，需开发适配时间序列的图像表示方法以提升生成质量与效率。
AI.method: 设计XIRP作为时间序列的二维图像表示，该表示具有尺度不变性与可逆性；采用Wasserstein GAN with Gradient Penalty（WGAN-GP）进行训练，并通过相似性与预测能力指标对比其他图像表示方法及RNN模型；引入改进的随机反演技术优化模拟质量。
AI.result: XIRP在预测能力指标上显著优于现有RNN生成模型，且改进的随机反演技术有效提升不同表示下的模拟质量，验证了方法的有效性与跨领域迁移潜力。
AI.conclusion: XIRP为时间序列提供了新颖且有效的图像表示方式，结合GAN技术可显著提升生成效果，未来有望在其他领域实现技术迁移与应用扩展。
